cn.description:
继《掌上台球》之后，又一款专为 Apple Watch 打造的精致卡牌游戏！
智能 AI 博弈、三档难度挑战、极致震动反馈。
无需网络，无需手机，抬起手腕，随时随地来一局！

游戏特色：

• 极致单机体验：买断制无广告，无需网络，零流量消耗，地铁、飞机、信号死角都能玩。
• 三档难度挑战：
   简单模式：新手福利，把把好牌，解压神器。
   中级模式：经典博弈，以智取胜。
   困难模式：富豪场心跳对决，赢了翻倍，输了……
• 江湖救急系统：输光了？别怕！系统霸气赠送“救急金”，助你东山再起，绝不让你扫兴而归！
• 多款精美皮肤：努力赢取欢乐豆，解锁多种牌桌主题！
• 沉浸触感反馈：专为手表优化的大按键布局，配合震动反馈，出牌手感一流。
• 表盘小组件：支持添加到表盘，一键开局，拒绝等待。
• 全球排行榜: 支持全球排行榜，挑战每日、每周冠军。

‌游戏操作说明：‌

• 轻触卡牌：选中手牌（卡牌上浮），再次点击取消。
• 点击出牌：智能检测牌型，不符合规则自动拦截。
• 抢地主：根据手牌质量，策略选择 1-3 分。
• 长按屏幕：摸鱼必备功能，长按 1 秒即可快速退出游戏，深藏功与名。
• 胜利规则：作为地主先出完牌，或作为农民配合队友先出完牌‌即可胜利。

advisories: 偶尔/轻微的现实暴力
cn.releaseNotes:
全球超百万玩家上头的女帝模拟器、真人实拍互动影视新篇《盛世天下》女帝篇现已全球多平台同步上线！《隐形守护者》开发团队 New One Studio 倾力打造！

约1000分钟超长真人演绎全新篇章，批奏折、颁圣旨，亲手斡旋朝野势力；结盟翻盘周旋怀柔，在真伪难辨的后宫博弈与惊心动魄的朝堂交锋中步步为营。从命悬一线到权倾天下，百种活法闯出重围！

【能称帝的互动爽剧，活下来就登基】 从身处绝境到走上权力巅峰，或踏平肃清、或从容化解，这条路上胆敢阻扰你的一切，终将烟消云散。权倾朝野、各掌一方的朝臣势力...当他们向你奉上一片赤诚，你是选择以真情相报、共担风雨，还是不动声色，将这份情意悉数纳入局中，化为勘破天下、执掌乾坤的一枚枚棋子？活成只属于自己的爽剧主角，万般抉择，终成你的盛世天下。

【4K再现传统美学，沉浸体验盛世风华】 从锦缎华服、非遗道具的细腻肌理，到古韵悠扬、震撼人心的国风配乐；从实景搭建的恢弘宫苑，到立体鲜活的人物刻画。媚娘篇和女帝篇共约1500分钟超长真人实拍篇章，搭配最高4K质感呈现，力求呈现东方宫阙的磅礴气象，带你亲身谱写一场波澜壮阔的东方权谋华章。

【深度交互升级，指尖上的施政博弈】 权力不再是一句单薄的台词，而是你指尖实打实的朝堂制衡！指尖轻触，批阅万机奏折；颁布圣旨，执掌朝野格局。是严明法度、肃清朝纲，还是广施仁政、怀柔天下？在重重掣肘中施展帝王权术，开创你的盛世！ 还有升级版专属帝王测试报告，深度剖析你的权谋风骨、危机决断与御人之道。在故事的结束，遇见最真实的自己。

《盛世天下》女帝篇，现已正式上线！立即下载体验，你的盛世，由你执掌！
cn.description:
本作品需全程联网。媚娘篇内容共为十六集，女帝篇内容共为三十二集，均含免费体验章节。

● 能称帝的互动爽剧，活下来就登基！百万销量口碑新篇《盛世天下》女帝篇正式上线

全球百万销量、斩获多项年度大奖的《盛世天下》媚娘篇新篇现已全球多平台正式上线！
立即体验这场惊心动魄的朝堂博弈，共同踏上女帝传奇登顶之路！你的每一个选择，都在塑造独一无二的剧情体验。

《盛世天下》女帝篇开启全新剧情与抉择：
——约1000分钟超长真人实拍篇章（较媚娘篇剧情扩容超2倍）
——4K电影级画面质感，沉浸体验盛世风华
——全新深度交互玩法：批奏折、颁圣旨，亲手执掌朝堂格局
——升级版专属人格测试：在故事的最后遇见真实的自己

● 4K电影级质感，极致东方宫廷盛宴
全程真人演绎、实景搭建，以4K电影的光影调度，匠心复刻东方宫阙的磅礴气象。从锦缎华服、非遗道具的细腻肌理，到古韵悠扬、震撼人心的国风配乐，全方位展现极致的东方古典美学。
由官鸿、黄羿、姚弛、林小宅等知名演员倾情出演。更具真实惊险刺激的体验、更恢弘的场景、更细腻的人物刻画，让盛世不止存在于荧幕之中，而真实铺展于眼前。你将亲身体验“君临天下”的东方美学盛宴！

● 从默默无闻少女到传奇女帝，你的剧本你来写！
想冲破命运的裹挟？在本作中，你将体验到最惊心动魄的宫廷权谋博弈！从默默无闻的少女，到在多方势力的掣肘中破局，最终登顶权力巅峰。感受运筹帷幄、制衡朝野的帝王智慧，这条逆天改命的称帝之路，由你亲手开创！

● 约1500分钟真人演绎内容，沉浸体验帝王人生
匠心打磨的媚娘篇与女帝篇共约1500分钟实拍篇章，为你铺陈开一幅波澜壮阔的盛世画卷。面对波谲云诡的朝堂局势，你的每一次落子、每一个抉择，都将引发蝴蝶效应。高燃反转、重重悬疑……在步步惊心中执掌乾坤，亲手改写王朝命运！
为你情有独钟或爱恨交织的角色打榜助力，谁能问鼎全球人气榜首，全在你的掌控之中。

● 告别旁观，真正体验执掌天下
摒弃枯燥的点击对话，体验深度交互玩法！权力不再是一句单薄的台词，而是你指尖实打实的朝堂制衡 ：
【批阅奏折】：指尖轻点，批阅如山奏折。平衡世家门阀，一笔落定，便是江山气象。
【颁布圣旨】：权衡利弊裁定朝野格局。是施行严明法度，还是施以仁君之恩？在掣肘中展现帝王权术，实现海晏河清的盛世宏图！

● 你是什么类型的帝王？专属人格测试报告升级
在故事的终点，你还将获得一份升级版专属帝王测试报告！深度剖析你的权谋风格、危机决策与御人手段。究竟是权情兼收、八面玲珑的“绝命鹤顶红”，至情至性、赴汤蹈火的“风月曼陀罗”，还是心狠手辣、一心问鼎的“卷王见手青”？在故事的终点，看见最真实的自己，生成你的专属人格图鉴分享给全世界！

告别混乱的纸笔记录！ ScoreMaster 是一款专为桌游与卡牌玩家打造的万用 App。为你省去繁琐计算，100% 专注于游戏乐趣。

完美支援各类热门游戏：

经典桌游：卡坦岛 (Catan)、卡卡颂 (Carcassonne)、魔力桥 (Rummikub)

卡牌与扑克：扑克牌、魔法风云会 (MTG)、宝可梦卡牌 (PTCG)、游戏王

派对与阵营：狼人杀、阿瓦隆、Codenames

角色扮演：龙与地下城 (D&D) 及各类自订计分游戏

六大核心功能一览：

直觉计分： 支援多玩家，一键快速加减分，介面清爽不中断。

战绩纪录： 自动储存每局最终分数与历史对战纪录。

起始玩家抽选： 多人触控萤幕，一秒随机抽出开局玩家。

随机掷骰子： 内建虚拟骰子，随点随掷，忘记带配件也不怕。

倒数计时器： 自订沙漏时间，派对限时问答必备。

对战计时器： 双人专用回合码表，告别长考，比赛更公平。
cn.releaseNotes:
ScoreMaster 迎来大型计分体验更新：

  - 全新精简计分介面，分数显示更清晰
  - 新增积分板显示模式，隐藏干扰工具列
  - 支援游戏中编辑玩家名称、颜色及人数
  - Step 可直接输入自订数值
  - Quick Adjust 新增 x1 / x10 / x100 倍率
  - Quick Adjust 加入内建数字键盘，输入更快更一致
  - 支援长按连续加减分
  - 改善排序体验，避免加分后玩家位置突然跳动
  - 新增 App Store 评分及分享 App 功能
  - 加入启动画面及介面修正

**Features**:
- WiFi enabled Smart Trainers are now supported
- Zwift Click V2: the new unlock handling is now available to everyone. A new "Use new unlock method" setting lets you switch back to the classic single controller at any time.
- To conserve battery, Bluetooth Controllers are disconnected after a few minutes when BikeControl is no longer connected to your trainer app (e.g. training session ended)
cn.description:
With BikeControl (formerly SwiftControl) you can control your favorite trainer app using your hardware click devices. Here's what you can do with it, depending on your configuration:

▶ Virtual Gear shifting
▶ Steering / turning
▶ Adjust workout intensity
▶ Control music on your device
▶ More? If you can do it via keyboard, mouse or touch, you can do it with BikeControl


Privacy and Security:
▶ BikeControl only accesses your screen to perform the gestures you configure
▶ No other accessibility features or personal information is accessed
▶ All gesture configurations remain on your device
▶ The app does not connect to external services for accessibility functions

Terms of use: https://bikecontrol.app/terms-of-use

If you love music and want to master your bass guitar in perfection like Richard Bona, Stanley Clarke, John Patitucci, Billy Sheehan, Victor Wooten, Gary Willis, or even better, then you just need to have this app!!!

Demo video: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2LPNsS2F6bs

This app is a great collection of bass guitar modes, that gives you an excellent original material for improvisations and solo on the bass! Bass Modes Symmetry School is a triple horizontal system, in which modes are played with three notes on each string. Today many progressive bass guitarists use the wide extended fingering instead of usual traditional. This school presents "horizontal-extended" fingering, that helps you to perform modes in 1-2 octaves bound. The material in this school is also irreplaceable if you want to master a shredding bass technique. The app will be useful as for beginners, so for professionals!

●●●●● Bass Modes Symmetry School features: 
--------------------------------------
- 3-notes-per-string approach works perfectly for bass
- Easy learning of modes
- Ability to achieve fast performance speed (●SHREDDING●)
- Theoretical and practical usage for guitar, bass and piano players
- Given material works best with jazz but also can be used for latin, pop, funk, rock, etc. 
- This school will work for a beginner as well as for intermediate and advanced players. 

●●●●● App Features: 
------------------ 
● 322 + 23 (new) types of different bass modes, which can be easily transposed, resulting in about 3,800 of total modes!
● Harmony feature: you can see and listen to the chords, over which given modes can be played. More information about these chords you can find in our "International Guitar Chords 1 & 2" apps 
● Every mode is provided with corresponding optimal fingerings for your comfort 
● Transpose modes to any desired key by dragging notes on the screen with your finger
● Metrotone with adjustable tempo and time signature can be used as a trainer
● 5 different Metrotone click sounds at your choice
● Cursor can display note names or fingering (selectable) 
● Notes can display note names or fingering (selectable)
● Sharp and flat signatures correspond to the current mode's key  
● Fast cycled playback of modes with adjustable tempo
● Slow step-by-step playback of modes for easier learning 
● Six selectable harmony timbres to choose from 
● Stereo Chorus FX for harmony chords at your choice
● Reverb effect, applied to bass guitar and harmony (adjustable)
● designed both for iPhone and iPad

● iOS 10 and up compatible
 
For support and full documentation on this and other our products please visit our website: 
---------------------------------- 
http://www.fonexsis.com
---------------------------------- 

With respect, 
Fonexsis Creative Group.

cn.trackCensoredName: 桌面月历 : Easy & Simple 月历
cn.releaseNotes:
* 提醒事项整合！

[新功能]
• 提醒事项整合 — 在应用和小组件中查看并完成任务
• 新增提醒事项专用小组件

[改进]
• 提升小组件稳定性
cn.trackName: 桌面月历 : Easy & Simple 月历
cn.description:
通过简洁清爽的小组件日历，节省时间，让每一天都更高效。
在 iPhone 主屏幕上直接查看和管理日期与日程。

◦ 主屏幕小组件 : 支持小、中、大三种尺寸的小组件。将日历小组件和日程列表小组件放在你想要的位置，在主屏幕上一目了然地查看日程。

◦ 互动小组件 : 在小组件上点按日期即可立即查看当天的日程，并通过月/周/日切换按钮轻松浏览其他日期。提醒事项也可直接在小组件上完成，无需打开应用即可管理日程。

◦ 多样化事件显示 : 可以用彩色条、圆点、数字等多种样式在日历上显示日程。会根据小组件尺寸自动优化。

◦ 日历显示 : 享受简洁清爽的月视图/周视图日历。显示 iPhone 日历、Google 日历、Exchange 等所有同步到 iCloud 的日历日程。

◦ 提醒事项整合 : 将 iOS"提醒事项"应用中的任务一并显示在日历上，并可直接在小组件上完成。一站式管理日程与任务。

◦ 农历支持 : 支持中国农历和韩国农历。可在日历上同时查看农历日期，节日和农历生日不会错过。

◦ 纪念日管理 : 注册并管理生日、结婚纪念日等重要纪念日。支持公历和农历纪念日，并可在指定时间收到提醒。

◦ 倒数日 : 用 D-Day 查看距离重要日子还有多少天。过去的日子以 D+ 显示，让你一目了然。

◦ 添加日程 : 想要保存到日历的日程，通过小组件上的按钮即可轻松添加。

◦ 日程搜索 : 点一下搜索按钮，即可快速便捷地找到你想要的日程。也可以指定日期范围进行搜索。

◦ iCloud 备份 : 纪念日数据将自动备份并同步到 iCloud。即使更换设备，数据也能安全保存。

◦ 深色模式 : 浅色模式和深色模式均配有优化配色，使用更舒适。

如在使用中有任何问题或疑问，请发送邮件至 'dayseed.help@gmail.com'。:D

◦ 本应用支持中文、英语、韩语和日语。

hk.trackName: 掌上鬥地主 - 手錶遊戲
hk.description:
繼《掌上台球 》之後，又一款專為 Apple Watch 打造的精緻棋牌遊戲！
智能 AI 博弈、三檔難度挑戰、極致震動反饋。
無需網絡，無需手機，抬起手腕，隨時隨地來一局！

遊戲特色：

• 極致單機體驗：買斷制無廣告，零流量消耗，地鐵、飛機、信號死角都能玩。
• 三檔難度挑戰：
   簡單模式：新手福利，把把好牌，解壓神器。
   中級模式：經典博弈，以智取勝。
   困難模式：富豪場心跳對決，贏了翻倍，輸了……
• 江湖救急系統：輸光了？別怕！系統霸氣贈送「救急金」，助你東山再起，絕不讓你掃興而歸！
• 多款精美皮膚：努力贏取金豆，解鎖多種牌桌主題！
• 沉浸觸感反饋：專為手錶優化的大按鍵佈局，配合 Taptic Engine 震動反饋，出牌手感一流。
• 錶盤小工具：支持添加到錶盤，一鍵開局，拒絕等待。

‌遊戲操作說明：‌

• 輕觸卡牌：選中手牌（卡牌上浮），再次點擊取消。
• 點擊出牌：智能檢測牌型，不符合規則自動攔截。
• 搶地主：根據手牌質量，策略選擇 1-3 分。
• 長按螢幕：摸魚必備功能，長按 1 秒即可快速退出遊戲，深藏功與名。
• 勝利規則：作為地主先出完牌，或作為農民配合隊友先出完牌‌即可勝利。

Descenders 由知名遊戲 的開發團隊操刀，是一款節奏緊湊的山地自行車下坡競速極限運動遊戲，上手容易，但需要反復挑戰方可成為高手。

極限運動新嘗試
- 隨機產生的地圖:每次挑戰都有全新的跳台、斜坡和急降地形等著你
- 自由式操控體驗:玩家可以控制騎手的任何細微動作，遊戲的深度物理系統可將這些操作化為一次次漂亮的特技動作
- 風險與獎勵:你需要控制騎手向更高更強的分數和特技連招衝刺，但要保證一定的成功率，否則你會輸掉比賽
- 建立你的名望:完善的線上名望系統讓你可以展現自己的實力，並解鎖新的車型和路線
- 完整授權的音樂:我們與知名的鼓打貝斯音樂公司 Liquicity 合作，為你帶來完美的音樂體驗，陪你一同征服山地賽道
- 成為下一個下坡競速王者:你能一鼓作氣通關整條賽道，達到傳奇下坡競速王者的評價嗎？騎上你的愛車開始挑戰吧！
加入車隊，成為傳奇
在《Descenders》，車隊就是車手的一切。玩家選擇加入一支車隊（Enemy、Arboreal 或 Kinetic）後，就需要與隊友一起面對未知的挑戰。

拿上心愛的山地自行車，選擇一個車隊，努力成為傳奇的下坡競速王者吧。你可以選擇頑強而熱衷特技的 Enemy 車隊，技術嫻熟並擅長花式越野的 Arboreal 車隊，或者是充滿熱血，追求極致速度的 Kinetic 車隊。

- 玩家將獲得車隊專用的配色和服裝，以及獨家的裝備

hk.description:
加入数百万玩家，开启这款怪物训练游戏的续集冒险之旅！
在《EvoCreo 2》中，进入充满神秘的怪物世界，捕捉、培养并进化超过300种怪物。体验一个开放世界的RPG，展开一场充满怪物战斗与冒险的游戏旅程。怪物的进化和捕捉是你在这个怪物游戏中的使命，而这片土地上神秘的怪物，等待着你的探索！

揭开迷人的冒险故事
作为一名新兵，在《EvoCreo 2》的角色扮演游戏（RPG）中，加入Shoru警察学院，解开怪物消失背后的谜团。这个怪物游戏不仅仅是捕捉怪物，背后还有更深的阴谋，考验你在怪物战斗中的策略能力。途中，你将完成50多个引人入胜的任务，帮助Shoru的市民，建立联盟并发现隐藏的宝藏。

捕捉与培养超过300只怪物
你喜欢怪物收集游戏吗？在这个开放世界RPG中，组建你的梦想队伍，捕捉、培养、进化各种怪物。游戏中包含了超过300种独特的怪物，每个怪物都有其独特的进化和颜色。体验多样化的怪物捕捉与培养，让你在回合制怪物战斗中制定策略，挑战自我，成为传奇怪物训练师！

探索充满怪物的冒险世界
在《EvoCreo 2》里，你可以享受超过30小时的离线与在线RPG玩法，探索这个充满怪物和隐藏秘密的开放世界。从茂密的森林到神秘的洞穴，再到繁华的城镇，Shoru大陆充满了待解的谜题。在冒险的过程中，挑战不同的怪物，完成任务，解锁隐藏的路径和传奇的宝藏。

掌握深度且策略性的战斗系统
准备好迎接训练师之间的激烈战斗了吗？在这个高度可定制化的RPG游戏中，你可以装备你的怪物，并解锁100多种独特特征来增强它们的能力。训练你的怪物，学习并掌握超过200种技能，随时根据战斗的需要调整技能。通过怪物战斗，管理元素弱点，运用策略技能，成为真正的怪物训练大师！

证明自己，成为终极怪物训练大师
挑战Shoru的最强怪物训练师，在这个付费RPG游戏中崭露头角！参加声名显赫的竞技场，只有最强的怪物训练师才能获得冠军称号。你能在怪物战斗中获得胜利，登上冠军宝座，成为最顶尖的怪物训练大师吗？

主要特点：
- 世界顶级付费角色扮演游戏的续集
- 捕捉、培养、进化超过300只怪物
- 没有怪物等级上限，充满挑战的游戏结局！
- 拓展的开放世界，30小时以上的离线与在线RPG玩法
- 引人入胜的回合制怪物战斗，深度策略元素
- 数百种技能和特征，自由定制你的怪物
- 超过50个充满冒险和奖励的任务
- 离线模式——无需互联网也能畅玩游戏
- 精美的像素艺术，回归经典怪物RPG风格

玩家为何喜爱《EvoCreo 2》：
《EvoCreo 2》是怪物训练游戏和怪物培养RPG的完美结合
物种收集、探索和战斗策略的完美融合
休闲和硬核玩家都能享受这款充满冒险和动作的怪物游戏
今天就加入我们的冒险，开始成为终极怪物训练大师的旅程吧！你能捕捉所有怪物，解开Creo的秘密吗？

hk.description:
"If you've not already played this brilliant, heart-wrenching game, then mobile is as good a place as any to let it completely destroy you." - , 9/10, Pocket Gamer UK

"This War of Mine isn’t exactly “fun,” but it’s definitely a game worth playing." , 9/10, 148apps

"I'm really excited to go home and download 11 bit studios' title on my iPad" , Game Informer

In This War Of Mine you do not play as an elite soldier, rather a group of civilians trying to survive in a besieged city; struggling with lack of food, medicine and constant danger from snipers and hostile scavengers. The game provides an experience of war seen from an entirely new angle. 

The pace of This War of Mine is imposed by the day and night cycle. During the day snipers outside stop you from leaving your refuge, so you need to focus on maintaining your hideout: crafting, trading and taking care of your survivors. At night, take one of your civilians on a mission to scavenge through a set of unique locations for items that will help you stay alive. 

Make life-and-death decisions driven by your conscience. Try to protect everybody from your shelter or sacrifice some of them for longer-term survival. During war, there are no good or bad decisions; there is only survival. The sooner you realize that, the better.

This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition
It's been two years since This War of Mine global release and we're still expanding the experience. This new free DLC, created especially for the Anniversary Edition, adds new characters, new locations to explore, and most importantly - a whole new ending, leading to a different outcome to the game. The dilemma though remains the same – how far will you go, to protect the ones you care about? 

Key Features:
• Inspired by real-life events 
• Control your survivors and manage your shelter 
• Craft weapons, alcohol, beds or stoves – anything that helps you survive 
• Make decisions - an often unforgiving and emotionally difficult experience 
• Randomized world and characters every time you start a new game 
• Charcoal-stylized aesthetics to complement the game's theme

This War of Mine experience is now broadened with "The Little Ones" expansion. "The Little Ones" explores the hardships of wartime survival as seen from an entirely new perspective―that of a child. This DLC puts you in charge of a group of adults and children stuck in a besieged city, struggling with basic necessities. TWoM: The Little Ones focuses not only on the reality of enduring war, but also on how even in times of conflict, kids are still kids: they laugh, cry, play, and see the world differently. In addition to thinking about survival, you'll have to summon your inner child to understand how to protect the little ones. Their youth, and their future, are in your hands.

• Experience the biggest expansion to This War of Mine
• Protect innocent children
• Craft toys, play with kids, and be the caretaker they need
• Meet new adult civilians in scenarios with children

PLEASE NOTE: This game is optimized for latest devices. While playing on older devices such as iPhone 4s or iPad 2 you might experience lower frame rates.

hk.description:
Fight. Endure. Break eternal damnation.

Blasphemous is an award-winning 2D indie action platformer with soulslike elements, offering brutal hack and slash combat and deep exploration across a dark, gothic world steeped in penance and suffering.

Set in the cursed land of Cvstodia, ravaged by a twisted curse known only as The Miracle, you play as The Penitent One, the last survivor of the Brotherhood of the Silent Sorrow, bound to a cycle of death and rebirth.

Face monstrous enemies, navigate deadly traps, and uncover hidden secrets in pixel perfect handcrafted levels. As you fight for redemption, you'll explore desolate cathedrals, forsaken wastelands, and blood-soaked dungeons, encountering grotesque monsters, merciless bosses and tormented souls along the way.

Penance Never Ends.

MAIN FEATURES
- Explore a Non-Linear World: Venture through diverse platformer environments filled with fearsome enemies and deadly traps. Seek redemption across the dark gothic landscapes of Cvstodia.
- Brutal Action Combat: Wield Mea Culpa, a blade forged from guilt itself. Unleash devastating combos and skills, and hack and slash your way through hordes of twisted monsters.
- Executions & gore: Deliver savage executions with pixel perfect animations that celebrate brutal combat and grotesque detail.
- Customise Your Build: Equip powerful Relics, Rosary Beads, Prayers, and Sword Hearts to shape your playstyle. Experiment with builds and unlock new progression paths to survive the impossible.
- Intense boss Battles: Face off against colossal bosses and deadly mini-bosses. Learn their patterns, endure their fury, and crush them.
- Unlock the Mysteries of Cvstodia: Meet a cast of tortured NPCs. Some will help, others will test your resolve. Unravel their stories and shape your fate in blood, guilt and damnation.

ALL DLCs INCLUDED
This mobile version includes all free DLCs ever released for Blasphemous, expanding the core game with new content, features, and challenges:
- The Stir of Dawn – Unlock New Game+, encounter new bosses and enemies, and dive deeper into the lore.
- Strife & Ruin – Brave the brutal Boss Rush mode and embark on a crossover quest with Miriam from Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night.
- Wounds of Eventide – Witness the conclusion of The Penitent One’s first journey and unlock an ending that connects directly to Blasphemous 2.

THE FULL BLASPHEMOUS EXPERIENCE – NOW ON MOBILE
- Includes every feature and content update from the original PC and console versions. Switch between precise touch controls or full controller support (gamepad compatible) for a seamless experience.
- No ads, no microtransactions.

MATURE CONTENT DESCRIPTION
This Game may contain content not appropriate for all ages, or may not be appropriate for viewing at work: Some Nudity or Sexual Content, Frequent Violence or Gore, General Mature Content.

Traverse the dungeon in this awesome action / bullet-hell roguelite where every choice could make or break your run. Stack over 130 different items and create powerful synergies to become truly overpowered with 13 unique characters!

BALANCE RISK & REWARD
Balance risk and reward as your make your choices! Push your luck to grow your build, but don't overestimate your abilities, or your run could end on the spot. Navigate the dungeon wisely and reap the rewards to optimize your build to crush the dungeon with 13 unique characters!

BECOME OVERPOWERED
Over 130 unique items can be mixed and matched to create a devastating build, laying waste to every enemy in sight! Be careful not to hurt yourself with an item that doesn't fit, and experiment with synergies to become an overpowered behemoth!

FIND SECRETS
Uncover the secrets of the dungeon on your quest to slay the Villain to unlock hidden paths, uncover new items, and grow your band of adventurers! And for those who crave a challenge, the greatest rewards are locked behind the greatest trials!

PLAY WITH FRIENDS
Play solo or with others in local co-op, with up to 4 people! Combine character abilities to improve your odds, or do a mild amount of trolling, the choice is yours! Please note that extra controllers are required to play with others.

hk.description:
MiniGames 是一個新、復古和現代遊戲的集合。您可以在 Apple Watch、iPhone 或 iPad 上無廣告地遊玩！就像您自己的隨身遊戲廳。

這個包含 28 款遊戲的合集包括：

■ GLIDE  
幫助紅鳥飛翔。利用山丘加速，飛得更高以獲得分數。

■ CIPHER  
破解密碼。根據每回合的提示猜出 4 種顏色的密碼。

■ SHAPES  
有趣的拼圖遊戲，將形狀掉落合併成新形狀。

■ TIC TAC TOE  
經典的井字遊戲。單人或與朋友對戰。

■ PONG  
玩最早創造的視頻遊戲之一。這個簡單的網球遊戲絕對是經典。

■ BRICK BREAK  
有趣的復古掉落磚塊遊戲。將磚塊堆疊在一起以清除一行並獲得分數。

■ INVADERS  
經典街機動作。射擊所有太空入侵者，別讓它們抓到你。擊中母艦可獲得額外分數。

■ 2048  
在手錶或手機上享受上癮的 2048 遊戲。滑動數字方塊以合併它們，達到 2048。

■ TUBE TWIST  
引導您的跑者穿越無盡的管道。扭動管道以避開洞和尖刺。收集黃色能量球，收集越多，速度提升時間越長。點擊角色以啟動速度提升。加速時碰到紅色跳躍可獲得額外分數。

■ BUBBLE  
經典三消拼圖遊戲。通過顏色連接氣泡以清除它們。

■ MISSILE  
您能在致命的導彈攻擊中生存多久？操控您的戰鬥機避開導彈，讓它們相撞。

■ HOP  
從平台跳到平台以獲得更高的高度和分數。沿途射擊有翅膀的壞蛋。

■ Drift  
享受在危險道路上的高速度漂移。一個錯誤的動作就會摔下去。儘量生存更久以獲得高分。

■ Cong  
就像 Pong，但在圓圈裡。使用數位表冠在圓圈中移動球拍，保持球在遊戲中。

■ Tower  
通過將彩色方塊堆疊在一起來建造您的塔。完美放置以獲得額外分數。

■ FLAP  
通過拍打翅膀引導小鳥穿越無盡的森林。

■ FROG ROAD  
幫助可愛的青蛙避開汽車並過馬路。經典 Frogger 遊戲的 3D 更新版。

■ BLOCK RUN  
想去跑步嗎？幫助方塊人通過跳躍、滾動和轉彎來避開彩色障礙物。

■ MATCHTRIS  
Tetris 和 Dr. Mario 的混合版。移動掉落的方塊以匹配 4 種或更多顏色以清除它們。設置方塊掉落並匹配以獲得連擊和額外分數。

■ DRONE  
駕駛您的無人機穿越外星飛船的無盡走廊。

■ THRUST  
綁上火箭靴，快速穿越黑暗洞穴。Thrust 將經典的洞穴飛行遊戲與 Flappy Bird 元素結合。

■ SUPER JUMP  
我們將簡單的平台遊戲的樂趣與無盡跑者結合。通過跳過洞、溝和敵人來保持角色奔跑。收集水果以獲得分數，得分越高，跑得越快。

■ RETRO RACER  
受 Outrun 和 Pole Position 等偽 3D 賽車遊戲的啟發，但擁有現代圖形。享受超現實的速度感，努力打敗時間。

請注意，這款遊戲需要 Series 4 或更新的手錶。

■ CONTRA PANG  
結合了 Contra 的射擊動作和 Pang 的泡泡爆破樂趣。

■ CIRCLE INVADERS  
經典太空入侵者的新變化。獨特的圓形設計和眾多增強道具。

■ MOON SNAKE  
我們將經典的吃水果蛇放在月球上。避開炸彈和自己的尾巴以生存。

■ DUAL BREAK  
有什麼比經典的打磚塊遊戲 Breakout 更好的呢？還有增強道具和額外的球拍可供控制。

■ CIRCLE BREAK  
就像圓形的 Pong 遇上 Breakout。保持球在圓圈內，打破所有障礙以完成關卡。

特點：
• 無廣告！  
• 支援 Apple Watch  
• 螢幕震動  
• 震動反饋  
• 音效  
• 音樂  
• 排行榜

hk.description:
「Cytus II」是雷亞遊戲繼「Cytus」、「Deemo」及「VOEZ」三款全球音樂遊戲排行榜冠軍作品後，由原班人馬傾注全力打造的音樂節奏遊戲續作。


未來，人類重新定義了網路的發展和連線方式，能夠輕易地在現實世界同步存取網路世界，改變了千年以來生活的樣貌。

在巨型精神網路空間cyTus裡，一位來歷不明的傳奇DJ Æsir，其音樂有著讓人為之瘋狂的魅力，每個音符和節拍都能夠深深重擊聽者的靈魂深處。

某日，從未露面的Æsir突然宣布要舉辦第一場大型虛擬音樂祭——Æsir-FEST，邀請了當紅偶像歌手以及人氣DJ作為開場嘉賓。

宣傳公開之際即造成前所未見的討論熱潮，所有人無不想一睹Æsir的真實面貌。

而在音樂祭入場的前一小時，數以千萬計的連線瀏覽次數打破歷史紀錄，整個城市瞬間沸騰了起來，等待Æsir如同天神般的降臨……

遊戲特色：

-獨特動態判定線音樂遊戲玩法
跟隨判定線打擊拍點以獲得高分，透過五種不同特性的拍點及隨節奏動態變化的判定線，讓遊戲過程更貼合音樂，輕鬆融入並沉浸在樂曲之中。

-50首+IAP(額外付費內容)，超越250首最高質量樂曲

This app is a great collection of bass guitar modes, that gives you an excellent original material for improvisations and solo on the bass! Bass Modes Symmetry School is a triple horizontal system, in which modes are played with three notes on each string. Today many progressive bass guitarists use the wide extended fingering instead of usual traditional. This school presents "horizontal-extended" fingering, that helps you to perform modes in 1-2 octaves bound. The material in this school is also irreplaceable if you want to master a shredding bass technique. The app will be useful as for beginners, so for professionals!

- Theoretical and practical usage for guitar, bass and piano players

hk.releaseNotes:
* 提醒事項整合！

[新功能]

hk.description:
透過簡潔清爽的小工具日曆，節省時間，讓每一天都更有效率。
在 iPhone 主畫面上直接查看與管理日期和行程。

◦ 主畫面小工具 : 支援小、中、大三種尺寸的小工具。將日曆小工具和行程列表小工具擺放在你想要的位置，在主畫面上一目了然地查看行程。

◦ 互動小工具 : 在小工具上點按日期即可立即查看當天的行程，並透過月/週/日切換按鈕輕鬆瀏覽其他日期。提醒事項也可直接在小工具上完成，無需打開應用程式即可管理行程。

◦ 多樣化事件顯示 : 可以用彩色條、圓點、數字等多種樣式在日曆上顯示行程。會根據小工具尺寸自動最佳化。

◦ 日曆顯示 : 享受簡潔清爽的月檢視/週檢視日曆。顯示 iPhone 日曆、Google 日曆、Exchange 等所有同步到 iCloud 的日曆行程。

◦ 提醒事項整合 : 將 iOS「提醒事項」應用程式中的待辦事項一併顯示在日曆上，並可直接在小工具上完成。一站式管理行程與待辦事項。

◦ 農曆支援 : 支援中國農曆和韓國農曆。可在日曆上同時查看農曆日期，節日和農曆生日不會錯過。

◦ 紀念日管理 : 註冊並管理生日、結婚紀念日等重要紀念日。支援國曆和農曆紀念日，並可在指定時間收到提醒。

◦ 倒數日 : 用 D-Day 查看距離重要日子還有多少天。過去的日子以 D+ 顯示，讓你一目了然。

◦ 新增行程 : 想要儲存到日曆的行程，透過小工具上的按鈕即可輕鬆新增。

◦ 行程搜尋 : 點一下搜尋按鈕，即可快速便捷地找到你想要的行程。也可以指定日期範圍進行搜尋。

◦ iCloud 備份 : 紀念日資料將自動備份並同步到 iCloud。即使更換裝置，資料也能安全保存。

◦ 深色模式 : 淺色模式和深色模式皆有最佳化的配色，使用更舒適。

如在使用過程中有任何問題或疑問，請寄信至「dayseed.help@gmail.com」。:D

◦ 本應用程式支援繁體中文、英文、韓文和日文。

mo.description:
繼《掌上台球 》之後，又一款專為 Apple Watch 打造的精緻棋牌遊戲！
智能 AI 博弈、三檔難度挑戰、極致震動反饋。
無需網絡，無需手機，抬起手腕，隨時隨地來一局！

遊戲特色：

• 極致單機體驗：買斷制無廣告，零流量消耗，地鐵、飛機、信號死角都能玩。
• 三檔難度挑戰：
   簡單模式：新手福利，把把好牌，解壓神器。
   中級模式：經典博弈，以智取勝。
   困難模式：富豪場心跳對決，贏了翻倍，輸了……
• 江湖救急系統：輸光了？別怕！系統霸氣贈送「救急金」，助你東山再起，絕不讓你掃興而歸！
• 多款精美皮膚：努力贏取金豆，解鎖多種牌桌主題！
• 沉浸觸感反饋：專為手錶優化的大按鍵佈局，配合 Taptic Engine 震動反饋，出牌手感一流。

‌遊戲操作說明：‌

• 輕觸卡牌：選中手牌（卡牌上浮），再次點擊取消。

• 搶地主：根據手牌質量，策略選擇 1-3 分。

mo.description:
Descenders 由知名遊戲 的開發團隊操刀，是一款節奏緊湊的山地自行車下坡競速極限運動遊戲，上手容易，但需要反復挑戰方可成為高手。

極限運動新嘗試
- 隨機產生的地圖:每次挑戰都有全新的跳台、斜坡和急降地形等著你
- 自由式操控體驗:玩家可以控制騎手的任何細微動作，遊戲的深度物理系統可將這些操作化為一次次漂亮的特技動作
- 風險與獎勵:你需要控制騎手向更高更強的分數和特技連招衝刺，但要保證一定的成功率，否則你會輸掉比賽
- 建立你的名望:完善的線上名望系統讓你可以展現自己的實力，並解鎖新的車型和路線
- 完整授權的音樂:我們與知名的鼓打貝斯音樂公司 Liquicity 合作，為你帶來完美的音樂體驗，陪你一同征服山地賽道
- 成為下一個下坡競速王者:你能一鼓作氣通關整條賽道，達到傳奇下坡競速王者的評價嗎？騎上你的愛車開始挑戰吧！
加入車隊，成為傳奇
在《Descenders》，車隊就是車手的一切。玩家選擇加入一支車隊（Enemy、Arboreal 或 Kinetic）後，就需要與隊友一起面對未知的挑戰。

拿上心愛的山地自行車，選擇一個車隊，努力成為傳奇的下坡競速王者吧。你可以選擇頑強而熱衷特技的 Enemy 車隊，技術嫻熟並擅長花式越野的 Arboreal 車隊，或者是充滿熱血，追求極致速度的 Kinetic 車隊。

- 玩家將獲得車隊專用的配色和服裝，以及獨家的裝備
- ]獲得最高名望值的車隊將奪得專屬獎勵
- Descenders Discord 伺服器將為車隊成員開通專用的車隊頻道

mo.description:
加入数百万玩家，开启这款怪物训练游戏的续集冒险之旅！
在《EvoCreo 2》中，进入充满神秘的怪物世界，捕捉、培养并进化超过300种怪物。体验一个开放世界的RPG，展开一场充满怪物战斗与冒险的游戏旅程。怪物的进化和捕捉是你在这个怪物游戏中的使命，而这片土地上神秘的怪物，等待着你的探索！

揭开迷人的冒险故事
作为一名新兵，在《EvoCreo 2》的角色扮演游戏（RPG）中，加入Shoru警察学院，解开怪物消失背后的谜团。这个怪物游戏不仅仅是捕捉怪物，背后还有更深的阴谋，考验你在怪物战斗中的策略能力。途中，你将完成50多个引人入胜的任务，帮助Shoru的市民，建立联盟并发现隐藏的宝藏。

捕捉与培养超过300只怪物
你喜欢怪物收集游戏吗？在这个开放世界RPG中，组建你的梦想队伍，捕捉、培养、进化各种怪物。游戏中包含了超过300种独特的怪物，每个怪物都有其独特的进化和颜色。体验多样化的怪物捕捉与培养，让你在回合制怪物战斗中制定策略，挑战自我，成为传奇怪物训练师！

探索充满怪物的冒险世界
在《EvoCreo 2》里，你可以享受超过30小时的离线与在线RPG玩法，探索这个充满怪物和隐藏秘密的开放世界。从茂密的森林到神秘的洞穴，再到繁华的城镇，Shoru大陆充满了待解的谜题。在冒险的过程中，挑战不同的怪物，完成任务，解锁隐藏的路径和传奇的宝藏。

掌握深度且策略性的战斗系统
准备好迎接训练师之间的激烈战斗了吗？在这个高度可定制化的RPG游戏中，你可以装备你的怪物，并解锁100多种独特特征来增强它们的能力。训练你的怪物，学习并掌握超过200种技能，随时根据战斗的需要调整技能。通过怪物战斗，管理元素弱点，运用策略技能，成为真正的怪物训练大师！

证明自己，成为终极怪物训练大师
挑战Shoru的最强怪物训练师，在这个付费RPG游戏中崭露头角！参加声名显赫的竞技场，只有最强的怪物训练师才能获得冠军称号。你能在怪物战斗中获得胜利，登上冠军宝座，成为最顶尖的怪物训练大师吗？

- 世界顶级付费角色扮演游戏的续集

- 离线模式——无需互联网也能畅玩游戏
- 精美的像素艺术，回归经典怪物RPG风格

玩家为何喜爱《EvoCreo 2》：
《EvoCreo 2》是怪物训练游戏和怪物培养RPG的完美结合
物种收集、探索和战斗策略的完美融合
休闲和硬核玩家都能享受这款充满冒险和动作的怪物游戏
今天就加入我们的冒险，开始成为终极怪物训练大师的旅程吧！你能捕捉所有怪物，解开Creo的秘密吗？

mo.description:
"If you've not already played this brilliant, heart-wrenching game, then mobile is as good a place as any to let it completely destroy you." - , 9/10, Pocket Gamer UK

"This War of Mine isn’t exactly “fun,” but it’s definitely a game worth playing." , 9/10, 148apps

"I'm really excited to go home and download 11 bit studios' title on my iPad" , Game Informer

In This War Of Mine you do not play as an elite soldier, rather a group of civilians trying to survive in a besieged city; struggling with lack of food, medicine and constant danger from snipers and hostile scavengers. The game provides an experience of war seen from an entirely new angle. 

The pace of This War of Mine is imposed by the day and night cycle. During the day snipers outside stop you from leaving your refuge, so you need to focus on maintaining your hideout: crafting, trading and taking care of your survivors. At night, take one of your civilians on a mission to scavenge through a set of unique locations for items that will help you stay alive. 

Make life-and-death decisions driven by your conscience. Try to protect everybody from your shelter or sacrifice some of them for longer-term survival. During war, there are no good or bad decisions; there is only survival. The sooner you realize that, the better.

This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition
It's been two years since This War of Mine global release and we're still expanding the experience. This new free DLC, created especially for the Anniversary Edition, adds new characters, new locations to explore, and most importantly - a whole new ending, leading to a different outcome to the game. The dilemma though remains the same – how far will you go, to protect the ones you care about? 

Key Features:
• Inspired by real-life events 
• Control your survivors and manage your shelter 
• Craft weapons, alcohol, beds or stoves – anything that helps you survive 
• Make decisions - an often unforgiving and emotionally difficult experience 
• Randomized world and characters every time you start a new game 
• Charcoal-stylized aesthetics to complement the game's theme

This War of Mine experience is now broadened with "The Little Ones" expansion. "The Little Ones" explores the hardships of wartime survival as seen from an entirely new perspective―that of a child. This DLC puts you in charge of a group of adults and children stuck in a besieged city, struggling with basic necessities. TWoM: The Little Ones focuses not only on the reality of enduring war, but also on how even in times of conflict, kids are still kids: they laugh, cry, play, and see the world differently. In addition to thinking about survival, you'll have to summon your inner child to understand how to protect the little ones. Their youth, and their future, are in your hands.

• Experience the biggest expansion to This War of Mine
• Protect innocent children
• Craft toys, play with kids, and be the caretaker they need
• Meet new adult civilians in scenarios with children

PLEASE NOTE: This game is optimized for latest devices. While playing on older devices such as iPhone 4s or iPad 2 you might experience lower frame rates.

mo.description:
Fight. Endure. Break eternal damnation.

Blasphemous is an award-winning 2D indie action platformer with soulslike elements, offering brutal hack and slash combat and deep exploration across a dark, gothic world steeped in penance and suffering.

Set in the cursed land of Cvstodia, ravaged by a twisted curse known only as The Miracle, you play as The Penitent One, the last survivor of the Brotherhood of the Silent Sorrow, bound to a cycle of death and rebirth.

Face monstrous enemies, navigate deadly traps, and uncover hidden secrets in pixel perfect handcrafted levels. As you fight for redemption, you'll explore desolate cathedrals, forsaken wastelands, and blood-soaked dungeons, encountering grotesque monsters, merciless bosses and tormented souls along the way.

Penance Never Ends.

MAIN FEATURES
- Explore a Non-Linear World: Venture through diverse platformer environments filled with fearsome enemies and deadly traps. Seek redemption across the dark gothic landscapes of Cvstodia.
- Brutal Action Combat: Wield Mea Culpa, a blade forged from guilt itself. Unleash devastating combos and skills, and hack and slash your way through hordes of twisted monsters.
- Executions & gore: Deliver savage executions with pixel perfect animations that celebrate brutal combat and grotesque detail.
- Customise Your Build: Equip powerful Relics, Rosary Beads, Prayers, and Sword Hearts to shape your playstyle. Experiment with builds and unlock new progression paths to survive the impossible.
- Intense boss Battles: Face off against colossal bosses and deadly mini-bosses. Learn their patterns, endure their fury, and crush them.
- Unlock the Mysteries of Cvstodia: Meet a cast of tortured NPCs. Some will help, others will test your resolve. Unravel their stories and shape your fate in blood, guilt and damnation.

ALL DLCs INCLUDED
This mobile version includes all free DLCs ever released for Blasphemous, expanding the core game with new content, features, and challenges:
- The Stir of Dawn – Unlock New Game+, encounter new bosses and enemies, and dive deeper into the lore.
- Strife & Ruin – Brave the brutal Boss Rush mode and embark on a crossover quest with Miriam from Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night.
- Wounds of Eventide – Witness the conclusion of The Penitent One’s first journey and unlock an ending that connects directly to Blasphemous 2.

THE FULL BLASPHEMOUS EXPERIENCE – NOW ON MOBILE
- Includes every feature and content update from the original PC and console versions. Switch between precise touch controls or full controller support (gamepad compatible) for a seamless experience.
- No ads, no microtransactions.

MATURE CONTENT DESCRIPTION
This Game may contain content not appropriate for all ages, or may not be appropriate for viewing at work: Some Nudity or Sexual Content, Frequent Violence or Gore, General Mature Content.

Traverse the dungeon in this awesome action / bullet-hell roguelite where every choice could make or break your run. Stack over 130 different items and create powerful synergies to become truly overpowered with 13 unique characters!

BALANCE RISK & REWARD
Balance risk and reward as your make your choices! Push your luck to grow your build, but don't overestimate your abilities, or your run could end on the spot. Navigate the dungeon wisely and reap the rewards to optimize your build to crush the dungeon with 13 unique characters!

BECOME OVERPOWERED
Over 130 unique items can be mixed and matched to create a devastating build, laying waste to every enemy in sight! Be careful not to hurt yourself with an item that doesn't fit, and experiment with synergies to become an overpowered behemoth!

FIND SECRETS
Uncover the secrets of the dungeon on your quest to slay the Villain to unlock hidden paths, uncover new items, and grow your band of adventurers! And for those who crave a challenge, the greatest rewards are locked behind the greatest trials!

PLAY WITH FRIENDS
Play solo or with others in local co-op, with up to 4 people! Combine character abilities to improve your odds, or do a mild amount of trolling, the choice is yours! Please note that extra controllers are required to play with others.

mo.description:
MiniGames 是一個新、復古和現代遊戲的集合。您可以在 Apple Watch、iPhone 或 iPad 上無廣告地遊玩！就像您自己的隨身遊戲廳。

這個包含 28 款遊戲的合集包括：

■ GLIDE  
幫助紅鳥飛翔。利用山丘加速，飛得更高以獲得分數。

■ CIPHER  
破解密碼。根據每回合的提示猜出 4 種顏色的密碼。

■ SHAPES  
有趣的拼圖遊戲，將形狀掉落合併成新形狀。

■ TIC TAC TOE  
經典的井字遊戲。單人或與朋友對戰。

■ PONG  
玩最早創造的視頻遊戲之一。這個簡單的網球遊戲絕對是經典。

■ BRICK BREAK  
有趣的復古掉落磚塊遊戲。將磚塊堆疊在一起以清除一行並獲得分數。

■ INVADERS  
經典街機動作。射擊所有太空入侵者，別讓它們抓到你。擊中母艦可獲得額外分數。

■ 2048  
在手錶或手機上享受上癮的 2048 遊戲。滑動數字方塊以合併它們，達到 2048。

■ TUBE TWIST  
引導您的跑者穿越無盡的管道。扭動管道以避開洞和尖刺。收集黃色能量球，收集越多，速度提升時間越長。點擊角色以啟動速度提升。加速時碰到紅色跳躍可獲得額外分數。

■ BUBBLE  
經典三消拼圖遊戲。通過顏色連接氣泡以清除它們。

■ MISSILE  
您能在致命的導彈攻擊中生存多久？操控您的戰鬥機避開導彈，讓它們相撞。

■ HOP  
從平台跳到平台以獲得更高的高度和分數。沿途射擊有翅膀的壞蛋。

■ Drift  
享受在危險道路上的高速度漂移。一個錯誤的動作就會摔下去。儘量生存更久以獲得高分。

■ Cong  
就像 Pong，但在圓圈裡。使用數位表冠在圓圈中移動球拍，保持球在遊戲中。

■ Tower  
通過將彩色方塊堆疊在一起來建造您的塔。完美放置以獲得額外分數。

■ FLAP  
通過拍打翅膀引導小鳥穿越無盡的森林。

■ FROG ROAD  
幫助可愛的青蛙避開汽車並過馬路。經典 Frogger 遊戲的 3D 更新版。

■ BLOCK RUN  
想去跑步嗎？幫助方塊人通過跳躍、滾動和轉彎來避開彩色障礙物。

■ MATCHTRIS  
Tetris 和 Dr. Mario 的混合版。移動掉落的方塊以匹配 4 種或更多顏色以清除它們。設置方塊掉落並匹配以獲得連擊和額外分數。

■ DRONE  
駕駛您的無人機穿越外星飛船的無盡走廊。

■ THRUST  
綁上火箭靴，快速穿越黑暗洞穴。Thrust 將經典的洞穴飛行遊戲與 Flappy Bird 元素結合。

■ SUPER JUMP  
我們將簡單的平台遊戲的樂趣與無盡跑者結合。通過跳過洞、溝和敵人來保持角色奔跑。收集水果以獲得分數，得分越高，跑得越快。

■ RETRO RACER  
受 Outrun 和 Pole Position 等偽 3D 賽車遊戲的啟發，但擁有現代圖形。享受超現實的速度感，努力打敗時間。

請注意，這款遊戲需要 Series 4 或更新的手錶。

■ CONTRA PANG  
結合了 Contra 的射擊動作和 Pang 的泡泡爆破樂趣。

■ CIRCLE INVADERS  
經典太空入侵者的新變化。獨特的圓形設計和眾多增強道具。

■ MOON SNAKE  
我們將經典的吃水果蛇放在月球上。避開炸彈和自己的尾巴以生存。

■ DUAL BREAK  
有什麼比經典的打磚塊遊戲 Breakout 更好的呢？還有增強道具和額外的球拍可供控制。

■ CIRCLE BREAK  
就像圓形的 Pong 遇上 Breakout。保持球在圓圈內，打破所有障礙以完成關卡。

特點：
• 無廣告！  
• 支援 Apple Watch  
• 螢幕震動  
• 震動反饋  
• 音效  
• 音樂  
• 排行榜

mo.description:
「Cytus II」是雷亞遊戲繼「Cytus」、「Deemo」及「VOEZ」三款全球音樂遊戲排行榜冠軍作品後，由原班人馬傾注全力打造的音樂節奏遊戲續作。


未來，人類重新定義了網路的發展和連線方式，能夠輕易地在現實世界同步存取網路世界，改變了千年以來生活的樣貌。

在巨型精神網路空間cyTus裡，一位來歷不明的傳奇DJ Æsir，其音樂有著讓人為之瘋狂的魅力，每個音符和節拍都能夠深深重擊聽者的靈魂深處。

某日，從未露面的Æsir突然宣布要舉辦第一場大型虛擬音樂祭——Æsir-FEST，邀請了當紅偶像歌手以及人氣DJ作為開場嘉賓。

宣傳公開之際即造成前所未見的討論熱潮，所有人無不想一睹Æsir的真實面貌。

而在音樂祭入場的前一小時，數以千萬計的連線瀏覽次數打破歷史紀錄，整個城市瞬間沸騰了起來，等待Æsir如同天神般的降臨……

遊戲特色：

-獨特動態判定線音樂遊戲玩法
跟隨判定線打擊拍點以獲得高分，透過五種不同特性的拍點及隨節奏動態變化的判定線，讓遊戲過程更貼合音樂，輕鬆融入並沉浸在樂曲之中。

-50首+IAP(額外付費內容)，超越250首最高質量樂曲
本次收錄樂曲涵蓋世界各地如日韓、歐美、台灣等創作者的作品，透過數位角色引領玩家遊玩如電音、搖滾、古典等不同風格之樂曲，是不辜負千萬人期待的自信力作。

-多達800種不同譜面關卡 
設計超過800種由易到難的音樂譜面，豐富的遊戲內容滿足不同等級的玩家，透過指尖的打擊體驗最刺激的挑戰和樂趣。

-與遊戲中的角色們一同進入虛擬的網路世界探險
獨特的故事系統 "iM" 將帶領玩家與遊戲中的角色逐步拼湊出 「Cytus II」背後的劇情脈絡與世界觀，在極富動態的視覺體驗中揭開故事的真實面貌。

mo.description:
透過簡潔清爽的小工具日曆，節省時間，讓每一天都更有效率。
在 iPhone 主畫面上直接查看與管理日期和行程。

◦ 主畫面小工具 : 支援小、中、大三種尺寸的小工具。將日曆小工具和行程列表小工具擺放在你想要的位置，在主畫面上一目了然地查看行程。

◦ 互動小工具 : 在小工具上點按日期即可立即查看當天的行程，並透過月/週/日切換按鈕輕鬆瀏覽其他日期。提醒事項也可直接在小工具上完成，無需打開應用程式即可管理行程。

◦ 多樣化事件顯示 : 可以用彩色條、圓點、數字等多種樣式在日曆上顯示行程。會根據小工具尺寸自動最佳化。

◦ 日曆顯示 : 享受簡潔清爽的月檢視/週檢視日曆。顯示 iPhone 日曆、Google 日曆、Exchange 等所有同步到 iCloud 的日曆行程。

◦ 提醒事項整合 : 將 iOS「提醒事項」應用程式中的待辦事項一併顯示在日曆上，並可直接在小工具上完成。一站式管理行程與待辦事項。

◦ 農曆支援 : 支援中國農曆和韓國農曆。可在日曆上同時查看農曆日期，節日和農曆生日不會錯過。

◦ 紀念日管理 : 註冊並管理生日、結婚紀念日等重要紀念日。支援國曆和農曆紀念日，並可在指定時間收到提醒。

◦ 倒數日 : 用 D-Day 查看距離重要日子還有多少天。過去的日子以 D+ 顯示，讓你一目了然。

◦ 新增行程 : 想要儲存到日曆的行程，透過小工具上的按鈕即可輕鬆新增。

◦ 行程搜尋 : 點一下搜尋按鈕，即可快速便捷地找到你想要的行程。也可以指定日期範圍進行搜尋。

◦ iCloud 備份 : 紀念日資料將自動備份並同步到 iCloud。即使更換裝置，資料也能安全保存。

tw.description:
繼《掌上台球 》之後，又一款專為 Apple Watch 打造的精緻棋牌遊戲！
智能 AI 博弈、三檔難度挑戰、極致震動反饋。
無需網絡，無需手機，抬起手腕，隨時隨地來一局！

遊戲特色：

• 極致單機體驗：買斷制無廣告，零流量消耗，地鐵、飛機、信號死角都能玩。
• 三檔難度挑戰：
   簡單模式：新手福利，把把好牌，解壓神器。
   中級模式：經典博弈，以智取勝。
   困難模式：富豪場心跳對決，贏了翻倍，輸了……
• 江湖救急系統：輸光了？別怕！系統霸氣贈送「救急金」，助你東山再起，絕不讓你掃興而歸！
• 多款精美皮膚：努力贏取金豆，解鎖多種牌桌主題！
• 沉浸觸感反饋：專為手錶優化的大按鍵佈局，配合 Taptic Engine 震動反饋，出牌手感一流。
• 錶盤小工具：支持添加到錶盤，一鍵開局，拒絕等待。

‌遊戲操作說明：‌

• 輕觸卡牌：選中手牌（卡牌上浮），再次點擊取消。
• 點擊出牌：智能檢測牌型，不符合規則自動攔截。
• 搶地主：根據手牌質量，策略選擇 1-3 分。
• 長按螢幕：摸魚必備功能，長按 1 秒即可快速退出遊戲，深藏功與名。
• 勝利規則：作為地主先出完牌，或作為農民配合隊友先出完牌‌即可勝利。

Descenders 由知名遊戲 的開發團隊操刀，是一款節奏緊湊的山地自行車下坡競速極限運動遊戲，上手容易，但需要反復挑戰方可成為高手。

極限運動新嘗試
- 隨機產生的地圖:每次挑戰都有全新的跳台、斜坡和急降地形等著你
- 自由式操控體驗:玩家可以控制騎手的任何細微動作，遊戲的深度物理系統可將這些操作化為一次次漂亮的特技動作
- 風險與獎勵:你需要控制騎手向更高更強的分數和特技連招衝刺，但要保證一定的成功率，否則你會輸掉比賽
- 建立你的名望:完善的線上名望系統讓你可以展現自己的實力，並解鎖新的車型和路線
- 完整授權的音樂:我們與知名的鼓打貝斯音樂公司 Liquicity 合作，為你帶來完美的音樂體驗，陪你一同征服山地賽道
- 成為下一個下坡競速王者:你能一鼓作氣通關整條賽道，達到傳奇下坡競速王者的評價嗎？騎上你的愛車開始挑戰吧！
加入車隊，成為傳奇
在《Descenders》，車隊就是車手的一切。玩家選擇加入一支車隊（Enemy、Arboreal 或 Kinetic）後，就需要與隊友一起面對未知的挑戰。

拿上心愛的山地自行車，選擇一個車隊，努力成為傳奇的下坡競速王者吧。你可以選擇頑強而熱衷特技的 Enemy 車隊，技術嫻熟並擅長花式越野的 Arboreal 車隊，或者是充滿熱血，追求極致速度的 Kinetic 車隊。

- 玩家將獲得車隊專用的配色和服裝，以及獨家的裝備
- ]獲得最高名望值的車隊將奪得專屬獎勵
- Descenders Discord 伺服器將為車隊成員開通專用的車隊頻道

tw.description:
加入数百万玩家，开启这款怪物训练游戏的续集冒险之旅！
在《EvoCreo 2》中，进入充满神秘的怪物世界，捕捉、培养并进化超过300种怪物。体验一个开放世界的RPG，展开一场充满怪物战斗与冒险的游戏旅程。怪物的进化和捕捉是你在这个怪物游戏中的使命，而这片土地上神秘的怪物，等待着你的探索！

揭开迷人的冒险故事
作为一名新兵，在《EvoCreo 2》的角色扮演游戏（RPG）中，加入Shoru警察学院，解开怪物消失背后的谜团。这个怪物游戏不仅仅是捕捉怪物，背后还有更深的阴谋，考验你在怪物战斗中的策略能力。途中，你将完成50多个引人入胜的任务，帮助Shoru的市民，建立联盟并发现隐藏的宝藏。

捕捉与培养超过300只怪物
你喜欢怪物收集游戏吗？在这个开放世界RPG中，组建你的梦想队伍，捕捉、培养、进化各种怪物。游戏中包含了超过300种独特的怪物，每个怪物都有其独特的进化和颜色。体验多样化的怪物捕捉与培养，让你在回合制怪物战斗中制定策略，挑战自我，成为传奇怪物训练师！

探索充满怪物的冒险世界
在《EvoCreo 2》里，你可以享受超过30小时的离线与在线RPG玩法，探索这个充满怪物和隐藏秘密的开放世界。从茂密的森林到神秘的洞穴，再到繁华的城镇，Shoru大陆充满了待解的谜题。在冒险的过程中，挑战不同的怪物，完成任务，解锁隐藏的路径和传奇的宝藏。

掌握深度且策略性的战斗系统
准备好迎接训练师之间的激烈战斗了吗？在这个高度可定制化的RPG游戏中，你可以装备你的怪物，并解锁100多种独特特征来增强它们的能力。训练你的怪物，学习并掌握超过200种技能，随时根据战斗的需要调整技能。通过怪物战斗，管理元素弱点，运用策略技能，成为真正的怪物训练大师！

证明自己，成为终极怪物训练大师
挑战Shoru的最强怪物训练师，在这个付费RPG游戏中崭露头角！参加声名显赫的竞技场，只有最强的怪物训练师才能获得冠军称号。你能在怪物战斗中获得胜利，登上冠军宝座，成为最顶尖的怪物训练大师吗？

主要特点：
- 世界顶级付费角色扮演游戏的续集
- 捕捉、培养、进化超过300只怪物
- 没有怪物等级上限，充满挑战的游戏结局！
- 拓展的开放世界，30小时以上的离线与在线RPG玩法
- 引人入胜的回合制怪物战斗，深度策略元素
- 数百种技能和特征，自由定制你的怪物
- 超过50个充满冒险和奖励的任务
- 离线模式——无需互联网也能畅玩游戏
- 精美的像素艺术，回归经典怪物RPG风格

玩家为何喜爱《EvoCreo 2》：
《EvoCreo 2》是怪物训练游戏和怪物培养RPG的完美结合
物种收集、探索和战斗策略的完美融合
休闲和硬核玩家都能享受这款充满冒险和动作的怪物游戏
今天就加入我们的冒险，开始成为终极怪物训练大师的旅程吧！你能捕捉所有怪物，解开Creo的秘密吗？

tw.description:
"If you've not already played this brilliant, heart-wrenching game, then mobile is as good a place as any to let it completely destroy you." - , 9/10, Pocket Gamer UK

"This War of Mine isn’t exactly “fun,” but it’s definitely a game worth playing." , 9/10, 148apps

"I'm really excited to go home and download 11 bit studios' title on my iPad" , Game Informer

In This War Of Mine you do not play as an elite soldier, rather a group of civilians trying to survive in a besieged city; struggling with lack of food, medicine and constant danger from snipers and hostile scavengers. The game provides an experience of war seen from an entirely new angle. 

The pace of This War of Mine is imposed by the day and night cycle. During the day snipers outside stop you from leaving your refuge, so you need to focus on maintaining your hideout: crafting, trading and taking care of your survivors. At night, take one of your civilians on a mission to scavenge through a set of unique locations for items that will help you stay alive. 

Make life-and-death decisions driven by your conscience. Try to protect everybody from your shelter or sacrifice some of them for longer-term survival. During war, there are no good or bad decisions; there is only survival. The sooner you realize that, the better.

This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition
It's been two years since This War of Mine global release and we're still expanding the experience. This new free DLC, created especially for the Anniversary Edition, adds new characters, new locations to explore, and most importantly - a whole new ending, leading to a different outcome to the game. The dilemma though remains the same – how far will you go, to protect the ones you care about? 

Key Features:
• Inspired by real-life events 
• Control your survivors and manage your shelter 
• Craft weapons, alcohol, beds or stoves – anything that helps you survive 
• Make decisions - an often unforgiving and emotionally difficult experience 
• Randomized world and characters every time you start a new game 
• Charcoal-stylized aesthetics to complement the game's theme

This War of Mine experience is now broadened with "The Little Ones" expansion. "The Little Ones" explores the hardships of wartime survival as seen from an entirely new perspective―that of a child. This DLC puts you in charge of a group of adults and children stuck in a besieged city, struggling with basic necessities. TWoM: The Little Ones focuses not only on the reality of enduring war, but also on how even in times of conflict, kids are still kids: they laugh, cry, play, and see the world differently. In addition to thinking about survival, you'll have to summon your inner child to understand how to protect the little ones. Their youth, and their future, are in your hands.

• Experience the biggest expansion to This War of Mine
• Protect innocent children
• Craft toys, play with kids, and be the caretaker they need
• Meet new adult civilians in scenarios with children

PLEASE NOTE: This game is optimized for latest devices. While playing on older devices such as iPhone 4s or iPad 2 you might experience lower frame rates.

tw.description:
本作品需全程連線。媚娘篇內容共十六集，女帝篇內容共三十二集，均含免費體驗章節。

您可能從沒體驗過這樣的作品——您當主角，真人互動的宮廷冒險！
《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》女帝篇全新推出！誠摯邀請您踏上驚險刺激的東方宮廷權謀之旅。

● 承襲《媚娘篇》佳績，再續宮廷傳奇
《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》媚娘篇贏得了廣大用戶的喜愛。
新篇《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》女帝篇，邀您提前鎖定這場驚心動魄的朝堂博弈，共同期待東方女帝傳奇的登頂新巔峰！

● 4K電影級質感，重塑東方宮廷美學
全程真人演繹、實景打造，結合4K電影級光影調度，匠心重現東方宮闕的恢弘氣象。從華服錦緞、金釵搖曳的細膩質感，到震撼人心的中國風配樂，全方位呈現極致東方古典美學。由官鴻、黃羿、姚弛、林小宅等知名演員傾情演出。更真實、更驚險刺激的體驗，更宏大的場景、更細膩的人物刻畫，讓盛世不再只存在於螢幕之中，而是於眼前真實展開。您將親身沉浸於「君臨天下」的東方美學盛宴！

● 從默默無聞的少女到傳奇女帝，您的劇本您來寫！
急欲掙脫命運的束縛？在本作品中，您將體驗最驚心動魄的宮廷權謀博弈！從默默無聞的少女，在多方勢力掣肘中突破困局，最終登上權力巔峰。感受運籌帷幄、制衡朝局的帝王智慧，這條逆天改命的稱帝之路，由您親手開創！

● 約1500分鐘真人演繹內容，沉浸體驗帝王人生
匠心打造的《媚娘篇》與《女帝篇》共約1500分鐘的實拍篇章，為您鋪展出一幅波瀾壯闊的盛世畫卷。面對詭譎多變的朝堂局勢，每一次落子、每一句對話，都將引發蝴蝶效應。高張力反轉、重重懸疑……在步步驚心中執掌乾坤，親手改寫王朝命運！
為您情有獨鍾或愛恨交織的角色應援助陣，誰能問鼎全球人氣榜首，皆由您一手掌控。

● 告別旁觀，真正體驗「朕即天下」
屏棄枯燥的點擊對話，深度互動玩法全面升級！權力不再只是一句空洞的台詞，而是您指尖真實運作的朝堂制衡

【批閱奏摺】：指尖輕點，批閱如山奏摺。周旋世家門閥之間，一筆定奪，盡顯江山氣象。
【頒布聖旨】：權衡利弊，左右朝局走向。是推行嚴明法度，還是施以仁政恩澤？在多方牽制中展現帝王權術，實現海晏河清的盛世宏圖！

● 您是什麼類型的帝王？專屬人格測驗報告升級
在故事的終點，您還將獲得一份升級版專屬帝王測試報告！深度解析您的權謀風格、危機決策與馭人之道。究竟您是權情兼收、八面玲瓏的「絕命鶴頂紅」，還是至情至性、赴湯蹈火的「風月曼陀羅」，又或是心狠手辣、一心登頂的「卷王見手青」？在故事的最後，看見最真實的自己，並將您的專屬女帝圖鑑分享給全世界！

關於New One Studio

我們是專注於互動敘事的獨立團隊，致力於用創新手法融合東方文化與互動體驗。2019年，是用戶陪著《The Invisible Guardian》走過BAFTA的榮光，更讓我們確信：好的互動敘事，能讓故事住進人心。這幾年，我們一頭栽進了古代盛世，醞釀了一個全新的故事。《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》，不僅為大家呈現東方權謀的「致命」美學，同時帶來考驗智謀與膽識的朝堂博弈。

兩個作品，不同的故事，同一顆初心，希望全球用戶都能在遊玩中再一次感受東方傳統文化的魅力，它將成為跨越文化的橋樑，為每一位支持全動態影像作品的用戶帶來一次全新體驗。

在《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》中，您將親自體驗一代女帝的成長之路。《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》之媚娘篇聚焦於她傳奇的起點——看她如何從默默無聞的少女，在危機四伏的宮廷中步步為營，憑智慧與膽識在險象環生的權力交鋒中存活下來。

在《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》女帝篇中，您將以執棋者的姿態直面更殘酷的朝堂博弈。運籌帷幄、制衡群臣，在波譎雲詭中開創盛世，親手書寫屬於您的盛世天下！

tw.description:
Fight. Endure. Break eternal damnation.

Blasphemous is an award-winning 2D indie action platformer with soulslike elements, offering brutal hack and slash combat and deep exploration across a dark, gothic world steeped in penance and suffering.

Set in the cursed land of Cvstodia, ravaged by a twisted curse known only as The Miracle, you play as The Penitent One, the last survivor of the Brotherhood of the Silent Sorrow, bound to a cycle of death and rebirth.

Face monstrous enemies, navigate deadly traps, and uncover hidden secrets in pixel perfect handcrafted levels. As you fight for redemption, you'll explore desolate cathedrals, forsaken wastelands, and blood-soaked dungeons, encountering grotesque monsters, merciless bosses and tormented souls along the way.

Penance Never Ends.

MAIN FEATURES
- Explore a Non-Linear World: Venture through diverse platformer environments filled with fearsome enemies and deadly traps. Seek redemption across the dark gothic landscapes of Cvstodia.
- Brutal Action Combat: Wield Mea Culpa, a blade forged from guilt itself. Unleash devastating combos and skills, and hack and slash your way through hordes of twisted monsters.
- Executions & gore: Deliver savage executions with pixel perfect animations that celebrate brutal combat and grotesque detail.
- Customise Your Build: Equip powerful Relics, Rosary Beads, Prayers, and Sword Hearts to shape your playstyle. Experiment with builds and unlock new progression paths to survive the impossible.
- Intense boss Battles: Face off against colossal bosses and deadly mini-bosses. Learn their patterns, endure their fury, and crush them.
- Unlock the Mysteries of Cvstodia: Meet a cast of tortured NPCs. Some will help, others will test your resolve. Unravel their stories and shape your fate in blood, guilt and damnation.

ALL DLCs INCLUDED
This mobile version includes all free DLCs ever released for Blasphemous, expanding the core game with new content, features, and challenges:
- The Stir of Dawn – Unlock New Game+, encounter new bosses and enemies, and dive deeper into the lore.
- Strife & Ruin – Brave the brutal Boss Rush mode and embark on a crossover quest with Miriam from Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night.
- Wounds of Eventide – Witness the conclusion of The Penitent One’s first journey and unlock an ending that connects directly to Blasphemous 2.

THE FULL BLASPHEMOUS EXPERIENCE – NOW ON MOBILE
- Includes every feature and content update from the original PC and console versions. Switch between precise touch controls or full controller support (gamepad compatible) for a seamless experience.
- No ads, no microtransactions.

MATURE CONTENT DESCRIPTION
This Game may contain content not appropriate for all ages, or may not be appropriate for viewing at work: Some Nudity or Sexual Content, Frequent Violence or Gore, General Mature Content.

BECOME OVERPOWERED
Over 130 unique items can be mixed and matched to create a devastating build, laying waste to every enemy in sight! Be careful not to hurt yourself with an item that doesn't fit, and experiment with synergies to become an overpowered behemoth!

FIND SECRETS
Uncover the secrets of the dungeon on your quest to slay the Villain to unlock hidden paths, uncover new items, and grow your band of adventurers! And for those who crave a challenge, the greatest rewards are locked behind the greatest trials!

PLAY WITH FRIENDS
Play solo or with others in local co-op, with up to 4 people! Combine character abilities to improve your odds, or do a mild amount of trolling, the choice is yours! Please note that extra controllers are required to play with others.

tw.description:
MiniGames 是一個新、復古和現代遊戲的集合。您可以在 Apple Watch、iPhone 或 iPad 上無廣告地遊玩！就像您自己的隨身遊戲廳。

這個包含 28 款遊戲的合集包括：

■ GLIDE  
幫助紅鳥飛翔。利用山丘加速，飛得更高以獲得分數。

■ CIPHER  
破解密碼。根據每回合的提示猜出 4 種顏色的密碼。

■ SHAPES  
有趣的拼圖遊戲，將形狀掉落合併成新形狀。

■ TIC TAC TOE  
經典的井字遊戲。單人或與朋友對戰。

■ PONG  
玩最早創造的視頻遊戲之一。這個簡單的網球遊戲絕對是經典。

■ BRICK BREAK  
有趣的復古掉落磚塊遊戲。將磚塊堆疊在一起以清除一行並獲得分數。

■ INVADERS  
經典街機動作。射擊所有太空入侵者，別讓它們抓到你。擊中母艦可獲得額外分數。

■ 2048  
在手錶或手機上享受上癮的 2048 遊戲。滑動數字方塊以合併它們，達到 2048。

■ TUBE TWIST  
引導您的跑者穿越無盡的管道。扭動管道以避開洞和尖刺。收集黃色能量球，收集越多，速度提升時間越長。點擊角色以啟動速度提升。加速時碰到紅色跳躍可獲得額外分數。

■ BUBBLE  
經典三消拼圖遊戲。通過顏色連接氣泡以清除它們。

■ MISSILE  
您能在致命的導彈攻擊中生存多久？操控您的戰鬥機避開導彈，讓它們相撞。

■ HOP  
從平台跳到平台以獲得更高的高度和分數。沿途射擊有翅膀的壞蛋。

■ Drift  
享受在危險道路上的高速度漂移。一個錯誤的動作就會摔下去。儘量生存更久以獲得高分。

■ Cong  
就像 Pong，但在圓圈裡。使用數位表冠在圓圈中移動球拍，保持球在遊戲中。

■ Tower  
通過將彩色方塊堆疊在一起來建造您的塔。完美放置以獲得額外分數。

■ FLAP  
通過拍打翅膀引導小鳥穿越無盡的森林。

■ FROG ROAD  
幫助可愛的青蛙避開汽車並過馬路。經典 Frogger 遊戲的 3D 更新版。

■ BLOCK RUN  
想去跑步嗎？幫助方塊人通過跳躍、滾動和轉彎來避開彩色障礙物。

■ MATCHTRIS  
Tetris 和 Dr. Mario 的混合版。移動掉落的方塊以匹配 4 種或更多顏色以清除它們。設置方塊掉落並匹配以獲得連擊和額外分數。

■ DRONE  
駕駛您的無人機穿越外星飛船的無盡走廊。

■ THRUST  
綁上火箭靴，快速穿越黑暗洞穴。Thrust 將經典的洞穴飛行遊戲與 Flappy Bird 元素結合。

■ SUPER JUMP  
我們將簡單的平台遊戲的樂趣與無盡跑者結合。通過跳過洞、溝和敵人來保持角色奔跑。收集水果以獲得分數，得分越高，跑得越快。

■ RETRO RACER  
受 Outrun 和 Pole Position 等偽 3D 賽車遊戲的啟發，但擁有現代圖形。享受超現實的速度感，努力打敗時間。

請注意，這款遊戲需要 Series 4 或更新的手錶。

■ CONTRA PANG  
結合了 Contra 的射擊動作和 Pang 的泡泡爆破樂趣。

■ CIRCLE INVADERS  
經典太空入侵者的新變化。獨特的圓形設計和眾多增強道具。

■ MOON SNAKE  
我們將經典的吃水果蛇放在月球上。避開炸彈和自己的尾巴以生存。

■ DUAL BREAK  
有什麼比經典的打磚塊遊戲 Breakout 更好的呢？還有增強道具和額外的球拍可供控制。

■ CIRCLE BREAK  
就像圓形的 Pong 遇上 Breakout。保持球在圓圈內，打破所有障礙以完成關卡。

特點：
• 無廣告！  
• 支援 Apple Watch  
• 螢幕震動  
• 震動反饋  
• 音效  
• 音樂  
• 排行榜

tw.description:
「Cytus II」是雷亞遊戲繼「Cytus」、「Deemo」及「VOEZ」三款全球音樂遊戲排行榜冠軍作品後，由原班人馬傾注全力打造的音樂節奏遊戲續作。


未來，人類重新定義了網路的發展和連線方式，能夠輕易地在現實世界同步存取網路世界，改變了千年以來生活的樣貌。

在巨型精神網路空間cyTus裡，一位來歷不明的傳奇DJ Æsir，其音樂有著讓人為之瘋狂的魅力，每個音符和節拍都能夠深深重擊聽者的靈魂深處。

某日，從未露面的Æsir突然宣布要舉辦第一場大型虛擬音樂祭——Æsir-FEST，邀請了當紅偶像歌手以及人氣DJ作為開場嘉賓。

宣傳公開之際即造成前所未見的討論熱潮，所有人無不想一睹Æsir的真實面貌。

而在音樂祭入場的前一小時，數以千萬計的連線瀏覽次數打破歷史紀錄，整個城市瞬間沸騰了起來，等待Æsir如同天神般的降臨……

遊戲特色：

-獨特動態判定線音樂遊戲玩法
跟隨判定線打擊拍點以獲得高分，透過五種不同特性的拍點及隨節奏動態變化的判定線，讓遊戲過程更貼合音樂，輕鬆融入並沉浸在樂曲之中。

-50首+IAP(額外付費內容)，超越250首最高質量樂曲
本次收錄樂曲涵蓋世界各地如日韓、歐美、台灣等創作者的作品，透過數位角色引領玩家遊玩如電音、搖滾、古典等不同風格之樂曲，是不辜負千萬人期待的自信力作。

-多達800種不同譜面關卡 
設計超過800種由易到難的音樂譜面，豐富的遊戲內容滿足不同等級的玩家，透過指尖的打擊體驗最刺激的挑戰和樂趣。

-與遊戲中的角色們一同進入虛擬的網路世界探險
獨特的故事系統 "iM" 將帶領玩家與遊戲中的角色逐步拼湊出 「Cytus II」背後的劇情脈絡與世界觀，在極富動態的視覺體驗中揭開故事的真實面貌。

us.description:
Fight. Endure. Break eternal damnation.

Blasphemous is an award-winning 2D indie action platformer with soulslike elements, offering brutal hack and slash combat and deep exploration across a dark, gothic world steeped in penance and suffering.

Set in the cursed land of Cvstodia, ravaged by a twisted curse known only as The Miracle, you play as The Penitent One, the last survivor of the Brotherhood of the Silent Sorrow, bound to a cycle of death and rebirth.

Face monstrous enemies, navigate deadly traps, and uncover hidden secrets in pixel perfect handcrafted levels. As you fight for redemption, you'll explore desolate cathedrals, forsaken wastelands, and blood-soaked dungeons, encountering grotesque monsters, merciless bosses and tormented souls along the way.

Penance Never Ends.

MAIN FEATURES
- Explore a Non-Linear World: Venture through diverse platformer environments filled with fearsome enemies and deadly traps. Seek redemption across the dark gothic landscapes of Cvstodia.
- Brutal Action Combat: Wield Mea Culpa, a blade forged from guilt itself. Unleash devastating combos and skills, and hack and slash your way through hordes of twisted monsters.
- Executions & gore: Deliver savage executions with pixel perfect animations that celebrate brutal combat and grotesque detail.
- Customise Your Build: Equip powerful Relics, Rosary Beads, Prayers, and Sword Hearts to shape your playstyle. Experiment with builds and unlock new progression paths to survive the impossible.
- Intense boss Battles: Face off against colossal bosses and deadly mini-bosses. Learn their patterns, endure their fury, and crush them.
- Unlock the Mysteries of Cvstodia: Meet a cast of tortured NPCs. Some will help, others will test your resolve. Unravel their stories and shape your fate in blood, guilt and damnation.

ALL DLCs INCLUDED
This mobile version includes all free DLCs ever released for Blasphemous, expanding the core game with new content, features, and challenges:
- The Stir of Dawn – Unlock New Game+, encounter new bosses and enemies, and dive deeper into the lore.
- Strife & Ruin – Brave the brutal Boss Rush mode and embark on a crossover quest with Miriam from Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night.
- Wounds of Eventide – Witness the conclusion of The Penitent One’s first journey and unlock an ending that connects directly to Blasphemous 2.

THE FULL BLASPHEMOUS EXPERIENCE – NOW ON MOBILE
- Includes every feature and content update from the original PC and console versions. Switch between precise touch controls or full controller support (gamepad compatible) for a seamless experience.
- No ads, no microtransactions.

MATURE CONTENT DESCRIPTION
This Game may contain content not appropriate for all ages, or may not be appropriate for viewing at work: Some Nudity or Sexual Content, Frequent Violence or Gore, General Mature Content.

us.description:
MiniGames is a collection of new, retro and modern games. You can play on your Apple Watch, iPhone or iPad with no Ads!
It's like your own personal games arcade on the go.

This collection of 28 games includes:

■ GLIDE
Help the red bird fly. Use the hills to gain speed and soar high to score points.

■ CIPHER
Crack the code. Guess the 4 color code from the clues you get per turn.

■ SHAPES
Fun puzzle game where you drop shapes to merge them into new shapes.

■ TIC TAC TOE
Classic game of noughts and crosses. Play single player or against a friend.

■ PONG
Play one of the first video games ever created. This simple tennis like game is an absolute classic. 

■ BRICK BREAK
A fun retro falling brick game. Stack the bricks together to clear a line and score some points.

■ INVADERS
Classic arcade action. Shoot all the space invaders before they get you. Hit the mothership for bonus points.

■ 2048
Enjoy the addictive 2048 game on your watch or phone. Swipe the number tiles around to join them. Join the tiles to reach 2048.

■ TUBE TWIST
Guide your runner down an endless tube. Twist the tube to avoid the holes and spikes. Collect the yellow power orbs, the more you collect the longer you can speed boost. Tap your player to activate your speed boost. Hit the red jumps while boosting to get your bonus score. 

■ BUBBLE
Classic match 3 puzzle game. Connect the bubbles by color to clear them.

■ MISSILE
How long can you survive a deadly onslaught of homing missiles? Maneuver your fighter plane to avoid the missiles and make them crash into each other. 

■ HOP
Jump from platform to platform to gain more height and points. Shoot the winged baddies along the way.

■ Drift
Enjoy high octane drifting down a treacherous road. One false move and down you go. Try and survive as long as you can to get the top score.

■ Cong
It's like pong, but in a circle. Use the digital crown to move the paddle around the circle and keep the ball in play.

■ Tower
Build your Tower by stacking colourful blocks on top of each other. Place them perfectly for bonus points.

■ FLAP
Guide the bird through a never ending forest by flapping your wings.

■ FROG ROAD
Help the cute frogs avoid the cars and cross the road. A 3D update to the classic Frogger game.

■ BLOCK RUN
Feel like going for a a run? Help the voxel guy avoid the colourful obstacles by jumping, rolling and turning around the corners.

■ MATCHTRIS
A mashup of Tetris and Dr. Mario. Move the falling blocks to match 4 or more colors to clear them. Setup the blocks to fall and match for combos and extra points.

■ DRONE
Pilot your drone down the never ending corridors of an Alien spaceship.

■ THRUST
Strap your rocket boots on and zoom down a dark cave. Thrust combines a classic cave flyer game with elements of flappy bird.

■ SUPER JUMP
We’ve taken the fun of the humble platformer game and mashed it with an endless runner. Keep your player running by jumping over holes, ditches and enemies. Collect fruit to score points and the more you score the faster you run. 

■ RETRO RACER
Inspired by pseudo 3d racing games like Outrun and Pole Position but with modern graphics. Enjoy the surreal, exhilarating sense of speed while you race to beat the clock.

Please note this game requires a watch series 4 or newer.

■ CONTRA PANG
A mashup of Contra’s shooting action and the bubble popping fun of Pang.

■ CIRCLE INVADERS
A new twist to the classic Space Invaders. With a unique circular design and lots of power-ups.

■ MOON SNAKE
We took the classic fruit eating snake and put him on the moon. Avoid the bombs and your own tail to survive. 

■ DUAL BREAK
What could be better than the classic paddle game Breakout? How about power-ups and an extra paddle to control.

■ CIRCLE BREAK
It’s like Pong in a Circle meets Breakout. Keep the ball from leaving the circle and break all the obstacles to finish the stage.

Features:
• No ads!
• Apple Watch support
• Screen shake
• Vibrations
• Sound Effects 
• Music
• Leaderboards

us.description:
"Cytus II" is a music rhythm game created by Rayark Games. It's our fourth rhythm game title, following the footsteps of three global successes, "Cytus", "DEEMO" and "VOEZ". This sequel to "Cytus" brings back the original staff and is a product of hardwork and devotion. 

In the future, humans have redefined internet development and connections. We can now easily sync the real world with the internet world, changing life as we have known for thousands of years. 

In the mega virtual internet space cyTus, there exists a mysterious DJ legend Æsir. His music has an irresistible charm; people fall madly in love with his music. Rumor has it that every note and beat of his music hits the audiences in 
the depths of their souls. 

One day, Æsir, who had never shown his face before, suddenly announced that he will be holding the first mega virtual concert —— Æsir-FEST and will invite a top idol singer and a popular DJ as opening performances. The instant the ticket sales began, an unprecedented rush occurred. Everyone wanted to see Æsir's real face. 

On the day of the FEST,  millions of people were connected to the event. At one hour before the event started,  the previous world record for most simultaneous connection was smashed. The whole city was on its feet, waiting for Æsir to descent from the skies...

Game Features:

- The unique "Active Judgement Line" rhythm game playstyle
Tap the notes as the judgement line hits them to achieve a high score. Through five different kinds of notes and the judgement line that actively adjusts its speed according to the beat, the gameplay experience is further combined with the music. Players can easily immerse themselves in the songs. 

- A total of 250+ high-quality songs (50+ in base game, 200+ as IAP)
The game includes songs by composers from all across the world, Japan, Korea, the US, Europe, Taiwan and more. Through the characters, players get to play songs from different genres including but not limited to: electronic, rock and classical. We are confident that this game will live up to the hype and expectations.

- Over 800 different charts
Over 800 different charts designed, from easy to hard. The rich game content can satisfy players of different levels. Experience exciting challenges and enjoyment through the sensation of your fingertips. 

- Explore the virtual internet world with the game's characters
The one-of-a-kind story system "iM" will lead the players and the in-game characters to slowly piece together the story and world behind "Cytus II". Reveal the truth of the story with a rich, cinematic visual experience.

◦ Versatile Event Display: Show events on the calendar as color bars, dots, numbers, and more. Automatically optimized for your widget size.

us.description:
Incredibox lets you create your own music with the help of a merry crew of beatboxers. Choose your musical style to start laying down, recording and sharing your mix. Get your groove on with hip-hop beats, electro waves, pop voices, jazzy swing, Brazilian rhythms and much more. As well, discover a selection of mods created by the community. Plenty to keep you mixing for hours, with no ads or microtransactions.

Part game, part tool, Incredibox is above all an audio and visual experience that has quickly become a hit with people of all ages. The right mix of music, graphics, animation and interactivity makes Incredibox ideal for everyone. And because it makes learning fun and entertaining, Incredibox is now being used by schools all over the world.

How to play? Easy! Drag and drop icons onto the avatars to make them sing and start to compose your own music. Find the right sound combos to unlock animated choruses that will enhance your tune.

Once your composition sounds great, just save it and share it to get as many votes as possible. If you get enough votes, you may go down in Incredibox history by joining the Top 50 chart! Ready to show your stuff?

You can also download your mix as an MP3 from the app and listen to it over and over again!

Too lazy to create your own mix? No problem, just let the automatic mode play for you!

Pump it up and chill ;)

****************
Incredibox, the brainchild of Lyon, France-based studio So Far So Good, was created in 2009. Starting out as a webpage, it was then released as a mobile and tablet app and became an instant hit. It has won several awards and appeared in various international media, including: BBC, Adobe, FWA, Gizmodo, Slate, Konbini, Softonic, Kotaku, Cosmopolitan, PocketGamer, AppAdvice, AppSpy, Vice, Ultralinx and many others. The online demo has attracted more than 100 million visitors since its creation.

us.description:
Game Introduction
Mobile Empire is a simulation game based on "manufacturing mobile phones", with a high degree of freedom. You will play as an entrepreneur back in 2001. You acquired the initial capital from a mystery investor because of your unique vision and created a technological enterprise that may change the world. The game starts from 2001 and ends in 2035, during which you will start with old school smartphones in the early R&D stages, progressing until AR smart glasses can be independently used. During the 35 years, you will experience, witness, and promote the magnificent development process of smartphones. You have the chance to develop your company into the world's number one technological enterprise.

• Unique theme
Currently, Mobile Empire is probably the only PC simulation game based on "manufacturing mobile phones". You will have the chance to create miracles and develop your little-known company into a global technological empire. 

• Innovative competition experience
In order to simulate a real business environment, lots of competitors will be constantly updated. Players may cooperate with them for joint development or poach talents from them. 

• Massive amounts of random events
In order to create a better "sense of the world", a great deal of industrial events, world events, crisis events, lucky events, employee events, and news interviews are set in this game for you to make your own choices.

• Bountiful blueprints
The game includes 65 different cell phone blueprints and more than 100 cell phone appearances from 3x3 keypads to full-screen and folding screens, and even includes futuristic AR smart glasses. Bountiful blueprints are yours to explore. 

• Vast technologies
In this game, there are many technologies and accessories are available for upgrade. In addition, with adequate funds, you can even research and develop CPUs with superior performance and experience better operating systems. Customized naming is also supported.

• Creative persuasion system
In terms of talent recruitment, the game provides a very distinctive "persuasion" system. To acquire the top talents, you need to use different communication skills to persuade the recruits according to their personalities.

• Other contents for you to explore
The game also includes credit ratings, company acquisitions, employee development, outsourcing mode, intelligence system, company strategies, and more for you to explore.

• "Mobile Empire" IOS supports the archive of PC games.

us.description:
Juicy Realm is a roguelike game with fruits as enemies. It is set in a world in which the line between animals and plants is blurred. It began with the tipping of the food-chain, which forced the humans to establish an outpost and begin an investigation in the region where the first species of mutated plants was discovered. The military has prepared a vast number of powerful weapons, with you leading the vanguard forces to wage this long war.

Subverted Order
“Many years later, when the humans watch as the plants climb up to the top of the food chain, they will be reminded of their own naivety and arrogance…”
Only when all the plants started to evolve into animals, growing limbs and becoming sentient, did the humans realize the threat of those photosynthetic-lifeforms. No one knows how they achieved the state of evolution that took animal lifeforms millions of years to reach in such a short amount of time, and no one knows their ultimate objective. The only thing known for sure is that the humans now face the greatest challenge since they climbed up to the top of the food chain.

Gameplay
As the first explorers of this unknown region, you must strive to venture deep into the enemy hive, defeat all kinds of fruits and arm yourself with various equipment, as well as upgrade yourself with the resources you find in your way.

-Rougelite elements such as random terrains, loot drops, and monsters

us.description:
A story-driven experience about two doctors traversing backwards through a dying man's memories to artificially fulfill his last wish.

ABOUT THIS GAME
Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts have peculiar jobs: They give people another chance to live, all the way from the very beginning... but only in their patients' heads.

Due to the severity of the operation, the new life becomes the last thing the patients remember before drawing their last breath. Thus, the operation is only done to people on their deathbeds, to fulfill what they wish they had done with their lives, but didn’t.

This particular story follows their attempt to fulfill the dream of an elderly man, Johnny. With each step back in time, a new fragment of Johnny's past is revealed. As the two doctors piece together the puzzled events that spanned a life time, they seek to find out just why the frail old man chose his dying wish to be what it is.

And Johnny's last wish is, of course... to go to the moon.

MORE DETAILS
"To the Moon", a story-driven RPG with pixel graphics, was originally developed six years ago for PC by Canadian producer Kan Gao and Freebird Games, his indie game studio.Rights to develop and publish the remastered mobile version of "To the Moon" were acquired by X.D. Network Inc.
The story of "To the Moon" unfolds before players, much like a movie. While the entire game has no battle system and can be completed in a few hours, the compelling story and moving original soundtrack resonated with players worldwide. On top of receiving overwhelmingly positive ratings, "To the Moon" received multiple awards from Gamespot, Metacritic, WIRED, and more, and was nominated for "I'm Not Crying, There's Something In My Eye" in the 2016 Steam Awards.

KEY FEATURES
•	Unlocked 29 new iMessage stickers.
•	Added "Music Box" function, allowing backstage music playing& in-game music downloading(will be enabled automatically after clearing the stage).
•	Added "DIY QR code" function, allowing one-key sharing of player data for playing on different devices.
•	A unique & non-combat story-driven experience
•	Innovative mix between adventure game elements and classic RPG aesthetics
•	Acclaimed original soundtrack that closely ties to the story
•	An espresso execution with zero filler and no time drains

us.description:
Cyber Manhunt is a Cyber-Style, Realistic- Society theme, Story-Rich indie game. The game taked place in the Republic of Alivia with some different theme stories ,but the fate of the characters is closely related in there. It will focus on social issues liking big data, hacking, citizen privacy etc... 

We want to reveal the profound themes behind the stories with wonderful plots and gamification. And let players pay more attention to Cyber Violence and Privacy Breaches.

[Contents]
◆Chapter I: Death of a Programmer
The CEO of a company committed suicide by jumping off a building, and claimed that he was extorted tens of millions by his wife. While his wife posted photos of domestic violence on social networks. Who is lying?
◆Chapter II: Invisible Eyes
The indecent video of the female college student went viral on the Internet. At this moment, she was already socially dead. Who is the initiator? Who should protect the safety of women?
◆Chapter III: The Evidence Vanishes
The student council president, who is both excellent in character and study, suddenly disappeared. The bullying incident made the case more complicated. Who is the murderer and who is the victim?
◆Chapter IV: The Price of Humiliation
The female singer has been exposed again! Threatening letters, hype, the suicide of former girl group members... The Internet has set off a public opinion carnival again!
◆Chapter V: Immortal Code
When the society is in madness, are you willing to join the Immortal Code to obtain true love and immortality?
◆DLC: Home Sweet Home
Behind this seemingly sweet and happy family, everyone has their own secrets, what is the truth hidden behind?!
◆DLC: Hello World!
Senior researcher of Titan Dr. Lucrezia died in a terrible car accident on the spot, but the fellow Benjamin took escape from death. But he did not realize that he was about to be involved in a huge conspiracy…

[Features]
◆Highly Immersive: Gamers play as a hacker in the game, accepts the commission of the company, and solve dangerous incidents.
◆Rich Gameplay: There are lots of features of Social Engineering in the game, which is including Detecting, Tracking, Puzzles-Solving, Destroying and Hacking etc..
◆Wonderful Plots: Each chapter in the game will reflect a current hot social topic, such as: Sneak Shot, Cyber Violence, School Bullying, etc...
◆Multiple Roles: There are many different roles in this game with a flash of personality. Their stories would be dug by yourself.
◆Fully Dubbing: All the characters in the game have their own voice actors that make the game experience more immersive.
◆Original Music: There are some original songs in the game, and the lyrics and vocals are all completed by the studio.

[Gameplay]
◆Web Search: You should collect basic information about the targets through the Internet search.
◆Database: You can use the database to get deep information about targets.
◆Crack: You would get passwords based on the obtained target's information, and use it to log in to accounts of different platforms.
◆Chat: The exciting thing is that you need to chat with targets by disguise and use the information to get the trust of the target.
◆Phishing: You can send phishing links to hack the targets' hardware devices, and get private information.
◆Picture Analysis: You can get valuable information and relevant clues from pictures.
More advanced hacking methods will be unlocked later!

Embark on an epic adventure in EvoCreo 2, the ultimate monster-catching RPG set in the captivating world of Shoru. Immerse yourself in a land teeming with mythical creatures called Creo. Uncover a Compelling Adventure Game

But there's more to the story than meets the eye in this monster game — dark plots are brewing, and your skills will be put to the test. Along the way, assist the citizens of Shoru by completing over 50 engaging missions, building alliances, and discovering hidden treasures.

Capture and Train Over 300 Monsters
Love monster-collecting games? Build your RPG dream team of Creo in this open-world role playing game. Hunt rare and legendary monsters, each available in unique alternate colors. With over 300 unique monsters to capture, evolve, and train, you’ll have endless possibilities to customize your strategy in pocket monster games. Explore this monster adventure game

From dense forests to mysterious caves and bustling towns, the continent of Shoru is filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered. Adventure through diverse environments, complete challenging quests, and uncover hidden paths to legendary treasures. Explore 2 more biomes in this sequel like the desert and find many monsters on the way of your adventure. 

Master a deep and strategic RPG battle system as a monster trainer & hunter

Train your Creo to learn and master over 200 moves, which you can swap anytime to adapt to new challenges. Face fierce opponents, manage elemental weaknesses, and use your tactical skills to gain the upper hand. Can you become a pocket monster master trainer?

Prove Yourself as the Ultimate Master Trainer
Challenge the strongest monster trainers across Shoru and rise through the ranks in this paid role playing game. Compete in the prestigious Coliseum, where only the best monster trainers are crowned as champions. Will you conquer every rpg battle and claim the title of Evoking Master Trainer?

- A sprawling open world with 30+ hours of offline & online gameplay.

Why Players Love EvoCreo 2:
Fans of Monster games and monster trainer RPGs will feel right at home.

Casual and hardcore gamers alike will enjoy the mix of action and adventure.

Join the adventure today and start your journey toward becoming the ultimate monster trainer in EvoCreo 2! Can you catch them all and master the secrets of the Creo?

tr.description:
"If you've not already played this brilliant, heart-wrenching game, then mobile is as good a place as any to let it completely destroy you." - , 9/10, Pocket Gamer UK

"This War of Mine isn’t exactly “fun,” but it’s definitely a game worth playing." , 9/10, 148apps

"I'm really excited to go home and download 11 bit studios' title on my iPad" , Game Informer

In This War Of Mine you do not play as an elite soldier, rather a group of civilians trying to survive in a besieged city; struggling with lack of food, medicine and constant danger from snipers and hostile scavengers. The game provides an experience of war seen from an entirely new angle. 

The pace of This War of Mine is imposed by the day and night cycle. During the day snipers outside stop you from leaving your refuge, so you need to focus on maintaining your hideout: crafting, trading and taking care of your survivors. At night, take one of your civilians on a mission to scavenge through a set of unique locations for items that will help you stay alive. 

Make life-and-death decisions driven by your conscience. Try to protect everybody from your shelter or sacrifice some of them for longer-term survival. During war, there are no good or bad decisions; there is only survival. The sooner you realize that, the better.

This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition
It's been two years since This War of Mine global release and we're still expanding the experience. This new free DLC, created especially for the Anniversary Edition, adds new characters, new locations to explore, and most importantly - a whole new ending, leading to a different outcome to the game. The dilemma though remains the same – how far will you go, to protect the ones you care about? 

Key Features:
• Inspired by real-life events 
• Control your survivors and manage your shelter 
• Craft weapons, alcohol, beds or stoves – anything that helps you survive 
• Make decisions - an often unforgiving and emotionally difficult experience 
• Randomized world and characters every time you start a new game 
• Charcoal-stylized aesthetics to complement the game's theme

This War of Mine experience is now broadened with "The Little Ones" expansion. "The Little Ones" explores the hardships of wartime survival as seen from an entirely new perspective―that of a child. This DLC puts you in charge of a group of adults and children stuck in a besieged city, struggling with basic necessities. TWoM: The Little Ones focuses not only on the reality of enduring war, but also on how even in times of conflict, kids are still kids: they laugh, cry, play, and see the world differently. In addition to thinking about survival, you'll have to summon your inner child to understand how to protect the little ones. Their youth, and their future, are in your hands.

• Experience the biggest expansion to This War of Mine
• Protect innocent children
• Craft toys, play with kids, and be the caretaker they need
• Meet new adult civilians in scenarios with children

PLEASE NOTE: This game is optimized for latest devices. While playing on older devices such as iPhone 4s or iPad 2 you might experience lower frame rates.

tr.description:
Fight. Endure. Break eternal damnation.

Blasphemous is an award-winning 2D indie action platformer with soulslike elements, offering brutal hack and slash combat and deep exploration across a dark, gothic world steeped in penance and suffering.

Set in the cursed land of Cvstodia, ravaged by a twisted curse known only as The Miracle, you play as The Penitent One, the last survivor of the Brotherhood of the Silent Sorrow, bound to a cycle of death and rebirth.

Face monstrous enemies, navigate deadly traps, and uncover hidden secrets in pixel perfect handcrafted levels. As you fight for redemption, you'll explore desolate cathedrals, forsaken wastelands, and blood-soaked dungeons, encountering grotesque monsters, merciless bosses and tormented souls along the way.

Penance Never Ends.

MAIN FEATURES
- Explore a Non-Linear World: Venture through diverse platformer environments filled with fearsome enemies and deadly traps. Seek redemption across the dark gothic landscapes of Cvstodia.
- Brutal Action Combat: Wield Mea Culpa, a blade forged from guilt itself. Unleash devastating combos and skills, and hack and slash your way through hordes of twisted monsters.
- Executions & gore: Deliver savage executions with pixel perfect animations that celebrate brutal combat and grotesque detail.
- Customise Your Build: Equip powerful Relics, Rosary Beads, Prayers, and Sword Hearts to shape your playstyle. Experiment with builds and unlock new progression paths to survive the impossible.
- Intense boss Battles: Face off against colossal bosses and deadly mini-bosses. Learn their patterns, endure their fury, and crush them.
- Unlock the Mysteries of Cvstodia: Meet a cast of tortured NPCs. Some will help, others will test your resolve. Unravel their stories and shape your fate in blood, guilt and damnation.

ALL DLCs INCLUDED
This mobile version includes all free DLCs ever released for Blasphemous, expanding the core game with new content, features, and challenges:
- The Stir of Dawn – Unlock New Game+, encounter new bosses and enemies, and dive deeper into the lore.
- Strife & Ruin – Brave the brutal Boss Rush mode and embark on a crossover quest with Miriam from Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night.
- Wounds of Eventide – Witness the conclusion of The Penitent One’s first journey and unlock an ending that connects directly to Blasphemous 2.

THE FULL BLASPHEMOUS EXPERIENCE – NOW ON MOBILE
- Includes every feature and content update from the original PC and console versions. Switch between precise touch controls or full controller support (gamepad compatible) for a seamless experience.
- No ads, no microtransactions.

MATURE CONTENT DESCRIPTION
This Game may contain content not appropriate for all ages, or may not be appropriate for viewing at work: Some Nudity or Sexual Content, Frequent Violence or Gore, General Mature Content.
